programme.desc: A time capsule rolls into the shop in the form of a 1983 Silverado with exactly 69.2 miles on it; the owner recently passed away, and his daughter wants to finish turning his truck into a modern muscle car under the hood.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: Ekstensive needs a new shop truck, Bill and the guys go sky-high with a lifted '21 F-450 King Ranch capable of hauling over 20,000 pounds; with most of the '46 Ford Coupe body beyond repair, the team has no choice but to build from the ground up.

programme.title: Unique Rides
programme.desc: Will and his team restore and customize a '94 Mustang Cobra for actor Mario Lopez; improvements to the vehicle include a hand-stitched leather interior, upgraded sound system and a two-tone custom paint finish.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: Dave and the guys at Kindig-It proved they could execute Dave's vision of his production Corvette, but now that a few have sold, they have to get them completely finished.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: Dave and the team put the finishing touches on the first-ever Kindig CF Corvettes to complete a lifelong dream; however, the clients argue about who will get the first one, all in advance of a once-in-a-lifetime debut at SEMA.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: The crew welds, grinds and hammers the frame and chassis of the barn-find '56 Ford truck; Joe uses all his tricks to make it look like it has been parked in a field for more than 50 years, but drive like a modern muscle machine.

programme.title: Texas Metal's Loud and Lifted
programme.desc: Putting a twin-turbo Cummins into a 2004 Lamborghini Gallardo is a monster build unlike any other for 1 Way Diesel Performance. YouTube's "Unspeakable" star Nathan Graham asks Mod Mafia to help him out of a jam with his all-terrain, amphibious SHERP.

programme.title: Engine Masters
programme.desc: The guys determine whether a dual 2.5-inch or a single 3.0-inch exhaust system has more power; they swap pipes on a run-of-the mill 351 Ford, then they test turbo versus straight-through mufflers and Y-pipe versus a 90-degree merge.

programme.title: Dirt Every Day
programme.sub-title: V-10 Budget Rock Bouncer Build! The Rock Viper
programme.desc: Fred Williams and Dave Chappelle decide to build a budget bouncer from a Dodge Truck with a V-10 engine, calling it the "Rock Viper."

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: Dave and Kevin, who have been an absolute treat for automotive enthusiasts for years, come back to the SEMA show with something special on their minds.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: The crew sinks their teeth into a legendary '77 Bandit Trans Am; a car of this stature calls for a big motor, meaty tires, low stance, steel spoilers, killer paint job and a brand-new interior; a '67 Chevelle returns for a supercharger engine.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: After John Cena makes a surprise appearance at the shop, Bill and the guys begin to customize John's small 1969 MGC to be a perfect fit; a new customer wants a handmade lifted suspension on his 1920 Denali 2500 as a gift for his wife.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: Normally when Kindig-It Design attends a car show, their cars are the ones being judged. But this time around, Dave and Kev hold the keys and will have to select the top 10 builders out of the hundreds of cars that arrive for the show.

programme.title: Roadkill
programme.desc: Roadkill survived 50 episodes and in that time, we've built a whole lot of cars; in this episode we've got a shootout of the 10 that are still running and driving.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: The guys attempt a three-day overhaul of the 351 Cleveland engine from the '67 Mercury Cougar that belonged to David Freiburger when the show began, but transferred to Steve Dulcich before the shoot was over.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.sub-title: Wrenching for Speed in the Roadkill Crop Duster!
programme.desc: David, Steve and a '70 Plymouth Duster return to the drag strip in search of the elusive 11-second quarter mile; the car has a new 500-horsepower 383, and the guys are ready to attack their demons and have fun in the process.

programme.title: Faster With Finnegan
programme.sub-title: Cheap Handling Upgrades on OBS Yukon
programme.desc: Cotten, Newbern and Finnegan make a low-buck version of an OBS Yukon by lowering it, upgrading the suspension and fixing some performance issues.

programme.title: Roadkill
programme.sub-title: Junkyard Turbo 5.0 Power for the Rotsun!
programme.desc: The world's most revered rust bucket gets powered by a used Ford 5.0L Mustang V-8 with a Power Stroke diesel turbo!

programme.title: Roadkill
programme.desc: A legit shootout of the performance potential of two hot project cars: the legendary Rotsun 1971 Datsun 240Z that was stuffed with a Ford 5.0L and a Power Stroke turbo-diesel on Episode 64, and the 1969 Chevey Impala.

programme.title: Roadkill
programme.desc: An abandoned Mach 1 is a dream find; David Freiburger and Mike Finnegan head to Colorado Auto & Parts in Englewood, Colorado, and visit the Corns family, the builders of the crazy radial-Cessna-powered 1939 Plymouth truck.

programme.title: Roadkill
programme.sub-title: Hemi Gasser vs. Hemi Super Bee
programme.desc: The return of two popular, Mopar Hemi-powered Roadkill project cars: Mike Finnegan's Blasphemi 1955 Chevy Gasser and David Freiburger's Rumble Bee 1970 Dodge Super Bee.

programme.title: Roadkill
programme.sub-title: Rescuing an Old Drag Race Car
programme.desc: One of the cheapest ways to go racing is to buy someone else's abandoned project car; Finnegan and guest co-host Tony Angelo are about to find out if the guys got what they paid for.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: David and Steve try to revive a 1975-ish Dodge pickup whose engine has been rotting outside since Ronald Reagan was president; when the adventure starts, they have no clue if the 360 small block can be saved.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: David and Steve had a blast getting an old Dodge 360 running and driving in a gutted old truck; now they want to jerk that engine and transplant it into a '70 Challenger that has been off the road since at least 1989.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.sub-title: Rare Jeep Revival and Road Trip!
programme.desc: David and Steve try to revive a 1967 Jeep J100 panel truck from Rick Pewe's backyard.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: A 1974 Chevy stepside pickup loaded with an LS6 engine gets a mini-makeover in preparation for the 2016 Hot Rod Power Tour.

programme.title: Faster With Finnegan
programme.sub-title: Lost in Suspension: Trouble With the Firebird
programme.desc: Cotton, Newbern, and Finnegan learn how a simple suspension upgrade can become a house of cards; major snags are hit and overcome as they attempt to run an 8-second pass with their supercharged barn-find '67 Firebird known as the Rubber Duck.

programme.title: Roadkill
programme.desc: Freiburger makes a sight-unseen purchase of a 1973 AMC Hornet that raced Baja in the '80s and finished the NORRA 1000 a couple of times before being parked circa 2012.

programme.title: Roadkill
programme.desc: On this episode, Finnegan teams up with guest host Tony Angelo to revamp the truck referred to as "Stubby Bob."

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: David and Steve attack a Jeep Scrambler that's been in the Freiburger fleet for about 20 years; they pull it out of hiding, spiff up some mechanical glitches, and head out for some hard-core rock-crawling adventures.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: David and Steve build up a cool, vintage body style by adding extra doors to a 1966 Chevelle they picked up for $1,000; it's all about fast and cheap trying to get this muscle car out for some sideways action on a dirt oval.

programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man admits to urinating in public. A couple spends their date night in jail after being over served, and a DUI suspect passes out during booking.

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man attempts to eat marijuana in jail. The Special Detention Unit investigates forbidden letters hidden amongst inmates. A bloody, vicious brawl escalates between an imprisoned duo.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A cologne salesman boasts and promotes his "magic potion". A man bloodies his neighbor in a one-sided feud. Taking an illegal drug has an unexpected consequence to one man’s face. Open Booking becomes a stage as one woman launches her singing career.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Sarasota, FL an unruly detainee is sent to isolation, twice. In Multnomah county a young man feverishly waits for his release. In Portland, OR a man is jailed for bitting his girlfriend.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, NV an intoxicated man is strapped to a restraining chair. In Portland, OR a seemingly gracious man is arrested for assault. In Spokane, WA a homeless man is brought in for assault. In Salt Lake City, UT a frequent visitor is brought in for threating the security staff at a local bar with a firearm.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Tequila is to blame when a man's behavior gets him locked up. A woman tries to sell drugs online. A detainee in holding for a DUI is of the opinion that he’s been jailed for driving too slow.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Needles are found on one woman while a stun gun is discovered on another. A DUI test stirs up bad memories for a man driving while intoxicated, and a convicted murderer becomes violent.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A jail chaplain counsels a sad inmate. An intoxicated woman demands to talk to the Canadian Embassy.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man is charged with possession of an illegal substance. Police arrest a woman for narcotics, and a couple is caught passing a fake prescription.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman is placed into a restraint chair during intake. Punches are thrown and questions are asked after a fight occurs. After dodging a bar tab, a woman is also accused of spiting and biting.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man arrested for domestic violence threatens to put all the officers in jail. Inmates on kitchen duty get into a fist fight over a dish towel. A woman unsure about her sexual identity is arrested for trespassing at a friend’s home. Officers find an unusual bit of clothing when a man is changed into a jail uniform.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Deputies assist arresting officers by removing an angry man from their patrol car. Violent outbursts plague an arrest. One woman struggles with bail. Three drunk men become wildly emotional.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man believes he is an alien wrongfully arrested for obstruction. Claiming to be a law school student, a man just doesn’t understand why he was arrested for trespassing. A woman claims she swallowed her friend’s pills for good reason. A family reunion ends with a bruised and bloodied husband.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Inmates are subdued after exhibiting unruly behavior. Anger drives emotions as a man accuses officers of racial profiling. An officer uses “verbal judo” to gain the upper hand with combative inmates.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A singer in custody performs for the officers. A woman is charged with burglary, and officers see right through a young woman's tears.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Guards uncover grooming aids stashed in an unlikely spot while combing through a woman's things. An incarcerated tourist threatens to bring in Johnny Cochran for his defense, and a drunk driver awakens to find X-rated artwork drawn on his body.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An uncooperative woman fights arrest resulting in a trip to the isolation chamber. One inmate calls 911 within jail walls causing confusion. Later, officers run to the rescue when a man passes out.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An aspiring martial-arts fighter tries to wriggle out of handcuffs and gets stuck. A football rivalry takes a bad turn when a Steelers fan assaults a Ravens fan.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In his holding cell, a man fights officers after taking Xanax. An officer discovers a suspect may be facing criminal charges for his son. K-9 units are needed during a search for improvised weapons.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Chaos surrounds a routine medical screening of an inmate. In the prison phone center, a smoking pipe is discovered and a mystery ensues. A pregnant woman is investigated over potential sex crimes.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman finds herself in jail after telling police she was frightened by a monkey mask. An intoxicate man feels an officer is very special. During a search, an officer finds contraband in a pack of cigarettes that has big consequences to an inmate. A young man says his mom tried to pepper spray him over his brother’s drug use while officers discover the truth to his arrest.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A media circus surrounds OJ Simpson as he is placed in jail for violating his bail agreement. During a body search, a man is tased and pepper-sprayed. A parole violation calls for all hands-on deck.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An inmate demands that officers follow her instructions while in jail. A man insists that he has been kidnapped by the police and is being held illegally. programme.desc: A search of a suspicious pedestrian turns into a foot chase. A suspect riding a red motorcycle refuses to surrender to police. A driver’s poor response time attracts attention.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers hold a man under a car at gunpoint after a traffic stop. Officers are flagged down and directed to a couple arguing on the street. A man apologizes to detectives for the illicit items they find.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect has a change of heart after he leads police on a pursuit. An Officer discovers sterile syringes and rocks in a suspicious man’s pocket after he is stopped and searched. A woman is arrested for stealing C.D's out of a car.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: We’re back and taking it to the streets! Season 11 comes roaring back with a look at Super Lite Cars on the road and the track! Stacey recalls and earlier SLC build and introduces two SLC builders who took a very hands-on approach to putting their cars together. These street/race cars are sure to catch your eye and get your racing blood flowing. If there’s one thing Stacey preaches on every episode, it’s paying attention to the details. His quick tip is no exception, getting rid of those sharp edges and nasty welds to give your project the small details that people will notice. Side mirrors for a muscle car, building a better battery, and keeping your air flowing through carbon fiber vents fill out the parts bin. We’ve got all this and more as Stacey kicks of his 11th season of GearZ!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: This is the moment you’ve been waiting for! Master car builder, Stacey David, shows off the truck that’s had the nation talking for ten years! Take a look back at the kid with the dream. Follow the design and fabrication. See what happens when the military tribute vehicle rolls out and conquers the road! This episode is gonna be epic. It’s been a long road, but anything worth doing well is worth the wait. This week, the wait is over. Sergeant Rock Lives!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.sub-title: On the Road & Unicure Spray Booths
programme.desc: Things are rockin’ and rollin’ in and out of the GearZ garage. Stacey hits the road to find a project build that will get gear heads buzzing. He ends up with an ’81 Camaro and some awesome stories from the seller. If you’re talking project vehicles, you’ve got to talk paint! And Stacey does just that with folks from Unicure, who specialize in paint booths and helping you get set up for that all important paint job. The V-8 Interceptor is back from a trip to Stainless works, where a custom exhaust system was made for the big Boss Nine engine. Things are about to get loud, this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.sub-title: The Return of Heavy Metal & Snowcat
programme.desc: Stacey and the GearZ crew roll in an old favorite: Heavy Metal. The coolest hotrod tow truck is back in the garage and ready for a facelift. Our good friends at the Hot Rod Institute drop by and talk shop with Stacey about his plans for the paint and fab work needed to get this bad boy looking good and back on the road. Fresh from the sandblaster, the snowcat reveals the scars that were under the skin. And with the drive train out, Stacey walks through the importance of replacing gaskets, seals and checking for wear and tear before stuffing that engine, transmission and skid steer rear end back into the cat. There’s a whole lot going on this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Every gear head has a secret: they all want to drive like McQueen in Bullitt, or Vin Diesel in The Fast And The Furious. But when the heat gets turned up, even some really good drivers can’t keep up. That’s when you bring in the Stunt Double! This week Stacey sits down with legendary Hollywood stunt man Ian Quinn to talk crashing cars and keeping actors out of harms way. There’s also a new project in the garage: The Stunt Double, a build inspired by the 80’s tv show The Fall Guy, and sure to get all four wheels off the ground before Stacey’s done with it. Sparks are going to fly and you know we’re gonna have a good time this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Seems like you can’t go more than a block these days without running into someone whose had some work done on their face. Well, here at the GearZ garage, Stacey believes in facelifts too. Just to prove it, he’s taken on a 1981 Camaro and sharpened his scalpel to perform an automotive nose job. Just wait till you see him whack of the old rubber nose and replace it with a 71’ rally sport front end! Now that’s what we call a facelift. Plenty of people said it couldn’t be done, but that’s just the kind of challenge Stacey is up for. Plenty of sparks are gonna fly, this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: They say that true change comes from within… Well, this week Stacey turns his attention to the interior of the Stunt Double. The old, crusty junk hits the floor and our Fall Guy inspired build gets a new look: from painting trim and door panels, to a new bench seat. Man o’ man, this truck is starting to look completely different. A shower of sparks lights up the garage as Stacey demonstrates how to make a bracket that mounts our new bench seat to the truck while using the stock seat adjustment. It’s a tour de force of aftermarket parts and salvaging what we’ve got, this week on GearZ!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: When you’re putting together a project that’s inspired by a high-flying stunt truck, you know you’ve got to add some lift, and our Stunt Double gets the goods this week. The front and rear suspension get treated to a 6” lift to get that rig up in the air. But a good lift won’t do any good if the steering and frame can’t hold up, so Stacey shows you how Offroad Design has fixed some serious issues that many late model four-wheel drives encounter. Bed need to come off your truck, but the carriage bolts are rusted and spinning? Stacey’s got a fix for that too. There’s a lot going on, and we’ve got you covered, this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Everyone needs a little boost here and there. For some people, coffee does the trick. But here in the GearZ Garage we take our boost seriously. And we like ours packing 160 HP. Hang on to your seat as Stacey adds a bolt on Supercharger to a Ram 1500 breathes a little excitement into a daily driver. And speaking of things going on in the garage, you’ll definitely want to stick around as Stacey talks shop with the guys at Rebuilding Generations. Learn all about how this mentoring program is teaching the next generation about working on cars and sharing plenty of life lessons. We’ve got a lot going on this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: We’re running full steam ahead as the Stunt Double rolls back into the shop this week! First, Stacey reveals the wheels and tires that are going to accentuate that 6” lift, then He dives headlong into the drivetrain of this beast and comes up with a hot crate engine and a high-performance transmission to get the Stunt Double ready for the road. But that’s not all…. We also take some time out for a visit with the guys from American Powertrain and so much more. Check out the sparks flying in the garage this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: It’s business as usual in the garage this week. We’re back at work on the Catalog Camaro and really diggin’ into the front end. You know what they say, “out with the old and in with the new,” and that’s exactly what Stacey’s doing. The old sub frame, drivetrain, and suspension are hitting the garage floor in favor of a much-needed updated suspension system that’ll keep this awesome Camaro hugging the road at high speeds—From the wheels to the sub frame, Stacey’s replacing it all. And he’s not going to break the bank while doing it, either. Follow the GearZ crew as they hit the road and visit Cornwell Tools to see their latest and greatest tool box being manufactured. From powder coat to knuckle bustin’ bolts, we’ve got you covered this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: We head out of the garage to visit one of the premiere supercharger manufacturers in the world… ATI Pro Charger. Follow along for the ride as Stacey walks through the entire process of how they have raised the bar on how a supercharger is built and what it does. From bulk metal to dyno runs, we’ve got it covered. Back in the garage, a young Gearhead drops by to learn how to install an air intake and cowl induction hood on his pick-up. After the wrench turning is done, he and Stacey have enough time to hit a few licks on their guitars. From massive horsepower increases with state-of-the-art tools and machinery, to simple intake and hood installs,….. it’s all here, this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey is in full hot rod mode as he unveils a wicked LS engine and Tremec 6spd tranny and stuffs it into the Catalog Camaro. If 600hp and a 6spd in a Camaro doesn’t get you going, the update on the Stunt Double will! It’s old school cool as Stacey shows off the stainless light bar, side steps and cutout flairs to give the truck that “Fall Guy” vibe. After that we introduce you to the amazing world of scale R/C that is sure to have you re-thinking what you want for Christmas! Finally we roll in some updates on the Cheetah and the Junkyard Jag too. If you’re a gearhead, you’re gonna find a whole lot to love about this show!......and that’s GEARZ!!!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Season 12 opens with bang as Stacey starts the final assembly process on the V8 Interceptor. If you’ve ever wondered how to lay out an aftermarket A/C system, wiring harness, and steering column on your project… and make them all work together, you have to see this show! After that, NHRA legend and Hall-of-Famer, Doug Herbert drops by the GearZ garage to share the shocking story that inspired him to start the B.R.A.K.E.S. driving program. Hold on tight, because this ain't your typical high school driver's Ed. Program! If you want cool tech and awesome stories… you’re gonna find that on GEARZ!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: It’s all about fabrication and thinking outside the box, or to be more specific... outside the bed! Sure, sure, there are plenty of custom pick-up truck beds you can buy but Stacey shows you what is involved in MAKING a custom bed to fit any vehicle, even something as crazy as a Thiokol Imp snowcat! That's right… our little snowcat is back from the sand blaster and ready for a cool bed to match the cab. Stacey goes in-depth about sizing up the project, picking the right parts, and most importantly: how to cut, weld, grind and finish sheet metal to get a bed that will fit your unique vehicle like a glove. So grab a welder… it’s time to make your bed!... only on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey takes a trip to Fort Carson, Colorado to visit the Army auto skills program during their world conference. Not only does Stacey get to meet a General, but he also meets a young Sergeant who is in the middle of a frame-off square body restoration. After a thorough walk around, Stacey decides to get LMC involved in helping out with this build. Parts for the bed of his truck can’t match the gratitude we share for our active military and all those who have served, but it’s a start. And we can’t wait to see the project when it’s finished. And speaking of new beds, with the custom bed on the Snow Cat, it’s time to address the tracks, and Right Track Systems has us covered. That little cat is going to tear it up when all is said and done! It’s going to be a lot of fun, this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: It’s all about Cougars! No, not that kind of Cougar... the kind with 4 wheels and a legendary pedigree! After a short history lesson about how these cars came into existence and why they were so cool, Stacey rolls the V8 Interceptor back into the shop and digs into the final assembly of this wild ’67 Mercury Cougar. This week’s episode focuses on planning out your final assembly, and taking care of all the little details, before you put the big things in like engine and transmission. Whether it’s planning out your brake system, battery location, or running fuel lines, Stacey shows how a little extra time in the planning department will make all the difference in your build.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey takes us through the history of the legendary SR-71 Blackbird. If you’re not familiar with this bird, it could fly mach 3.2, cruise at 80,000 feet and kept our country safe through its many reconnaissance missions. Never shot down, and never outrun, it was the hot rod of the sky! Stacey gets to sit down with pilot Lt. Col. Ed Yeilding and talk about his record setting transcontinental flight—Coast to Coast in 67 minutes and 54 seconds! The iconic Blackbird was such an inspiration that you know Stacey had to make a vehicle inspired by and paying tribute to it, so get ready to meet the SR-71 Rapid Tool Express!!!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.sub-title: Catalog Camaro Butt Lift and Tummy Tuck
programme.desc: The Catalog Camaro is back in the garage and ready to go under the knife as Stacey shows how to do a butt lift and tummy tuck on a 2nd generation Camaro. What does that mean? Well, last season Stacey performed a nose job on this old ’81 Camaro to show how easy it is to get rid of the 80’s plastic front bumpers and put on the classic early 70’s split-bumper, rally sport front sheetmetal. This week he continues the makeover by losing the plastic rear bumper and wrap-around taillights and grafting in the early 70’s quarter panels, round taillights and chrome bumper. It’s more in depth than the front and definitely requires some skilled metal surgery, but Stacey shows you all the tricks on how to do it properly. So, sit back and enjoy the ride as Stacey details how to measure, cut, and weld your way to a much younger looking Camaro.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: The focus has shifted, with parts having arrived at the shop it’s time to install the Grill, Bumper, Dash and Interior of our 1968 Turbine Bronze Charger. Mark and the Ghouls work their magic on the Charger until a familiar face shows up. With Royal there, Mark shifts the crew back to the 1 of 2 1970 Coronet and finishes the interior. Then, it’s time for a test drive!

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: With SEMA 2018 looming on the horizon, it’s time to address the elephant in the room. Mark’s 1964 A100 Hemi truck, the Little Dead Wagon, built as an homage to Bill Maverick’s Little Red Wagon. Will is set to prime and paint, but has a disagreement with Mark over the color. When the engine for the A100 shows up it’s time to unbox one of the most powerful engines Graveyard Carz has ever put in a car!

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: Mark and the Ghouls get down to work like never before in order to get the A100 ready for SEMA which is only weeks away. Brakes, suspension, tail lights, bed sealer, you name it and the Mopar Maniacs are racing to get it done. With time flying and stress mounting the team works long hours and weekends trying to finish this iconic build. With SEMA only days away, the A100 finally gets it’s iconic 426 HEMI engine, well, if they can make it fit!

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.sub-title: Night of the Little Dead Wagon
programme.desc: There is no time left, SEMA is almost here but the iconic A100 still needs some buttoning up. Installing all of the final components is an all hands on deck task and when the dust settles, Mark has only the decals left to put on the car, completing its legendary look. With the A100 finished the team heads out to SEMA in order to roll the Little Dead Wagon over the red carpet for Mopar and Mark once again receives a very kind gift from our friends.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: When Mark get’s started talking about a car there is almost no stopping him. So it is again when Mark picks multiple years of a favorite Mopar of his and tells both the audience, and whoever will listen all about their amazing options and cool differences. The Ghouls join in on the fun just like last time to pick their favorite things as well. Don’t worry, though, he can’t talk forever right?

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: With SEMA over the Ghoulz can finally rest and get back to work on all the cars they had to leave untouched for the last few weeks…again. First up on deck is our beautiful 1972 Duster. Needing its Dash installed as well as its interior there is still a lot of work left on this car! Additionally, metal work has begun on a host of new cars moving up through the shop, it never stops at Graveyard Carz.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: A 1970 Challenger is a special thing, but a B5 Challenger is even more special. With the bumblebee stripe finally added to the car it’s time for the work to really begin. Work begins on all the things that make this 1970 Challenger special, including the headliner, dash, interior and more. With that done it’s time for this beautiful Challenger to get its 440 Six Pack!

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: The time has finally come. Brett Torino is coming and he is here for his car, the legendary 1 of 2 ever made, 1970 Coronet! Mark wouldn’t be Mark, though, without a few tricks up his sleeve. When Brett arrives to collect on his long restoration from the Mopar Master, the reveal of this truly one of a kind car is done with style. But not before Mark takes us back through the entire restoration leading up to that point. It Is the last 1970 Hemi Coronet Convertible on earth, after all.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: The guys take us through the Dana and Ford rear ends, showing which would be right for your application.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: Kevin takes us to a race shop where he sees what goes into a high performance NASCAR team.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: The guys bring new life to a Model A by getting the electric starter back into working order with a new ring gear.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: Willie and Kevin completely overhaul the steering system of a Chevelle.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: Kevin gives us a great lesson on body fab while fixing a rolled area of a fender.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: WRX STI gets unleashed with some track inspired upgrades.

programme.title: Tow Jobs: Tennessee
programme.sub-title: Neither Snow nor brakes nor bad phone calls
programme.desc: A mailman needs rescued, brakes go out on a vehicle and funny phone calls on this episode!

programme.title: Tow Jobs: Tennessee
programme.desc: Jeff and Kristen get into a delicate mix of snappy people and trapped work vehicles.

programme.title: Tow Jobs: Tennessee
programme.desc: Follow Jeff and Kristen Patton in the wild adventures of their towing service in the scenic and sometimes dangerous Pigeon Forge TN. This episode Jeff helps a semi driver get out of a tight turn, move a sly cone manipulator, and get a couple people off a ledge. All in a days work!

programme.title: Tow Jobs: Tennessee
programme.desc: Jeff and Kristen Patton are back. This episode takes the crew to capture a stolen car and rescue a ditched car. All in a days work!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey rolls in a Big Bad Buick Riviera and shows you what is possible with the right vehicle and some bolt on parts. This 1972 Riviera is a great entry-level project that won’t break the bank, and has the potential to serve some serious humble-pie to any unsuspecting hot shot that may want to mix it up at the stoplight. As it sits, the big 455 under the hood is a force to be reckoned with, but Stacey shows what a weekend in the garage and a top end rebuild can do for a car like this! Get ready to get your hands dirty and bust a few knuckles as Stacey pulls the old heads, intake, cam, and ignition off and replaces them with performance parts from companies like TA Performance, Edelbrock, and MSD. It’s a lesson in Buick and bolt-on horsepower, and you’re only gonna find it on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: The GearZ crew hits the road this week and travels to the Charlotte Speed Shop to see how paint prep is going on Stacey’s Cheetah Evolution Car. With the hood and side vents glassed in and smoothed out, the first coat of primer gets sprayed and this awesome cat takes one big step closer to coming home! Stacey also stops by to visit with a fellow boat tail Riviera owner and trade tips on beefing up these classic beauties. It turns out that this guy and Stacey had both been watching this same car when it came up for sale! Come hang out with us as we visit some great folks this week on GearZ.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey gets down to business on the Big Bad Buick. With the top end engine rebuilt, the exterior and interior of the car need some serious updating. You don’t have to spend a ton of cash on simple modifications. Stacey shows what’s behind making a good clean line with your bumpers and how a simple front and rear bumper tuck can drastically change the appearance. Replacing the grille and scraping off that old vinyl top are also sure-fire ways to add attitude to this big ol’ boat tail. That old carpet has got to go! Follow along as Stacey shows the ins and outs and some tips and tricks to keep your exterior and interior redo from breaking the bank.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Not everyone out there is wrenching on an a classic. In fact, we get tons of emails from viewers who want to upgrade brand-new vehicles but aren’t sure how to get started. Well, Stacey has the answer—and it comes with a little help from our friend and NASCAR legend Jimmie Johnson and a stunning 2018 Camaro SS. Come hang out in the garage as Stacey walks you through the top seven modifications that you can make to a car that you just drove off the lot! Everything from paint upgrades to wheels, Stacey’s got a list. Let’s get started!

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: It's getting hot in this episode of Stunt Heroes. Stuntman Paul will be engulfed by flames as everything around him blows up in this dangerous fire stunt. The Action Concept team carefully prepares for this heated scene.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: For a showreel, the team choreographs a fight that involves hand-to-hand combat, glass bottles shattering on heads and bodies crashing through walls. In the end, a car flies high, detonates in the air, leaving a trail of destruction.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Action Concept wreck more than 100 cars each year for their stunts. In this episode, a quad rider is chased by a car. The car is crashed in the process and the quad bike also has to be destroyed, but the question is how?

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: In this episode of Stunt Heroes, it's all about stunt driver Christoph Knobloch. He drives down a ramp and crashes into cars stacked on top of each other while several petrol barrels explode at the same time.

programme.title: Harley-Davidson Trio
programme.desc: We took a look at three very different Harley-Davidson models. The versatile Switchback Dyna, the motorized wheelie bike Sportster 72, and the bad-boy motorcycle Softail Slim.

programme.title: Rimac Concept One
programme.desc: The futuristically designed Rimac Concept One is one of the fastest, most powerful and expensive electric cars in the world, it does not adhere to convention.

programme.title: Bentley Bentayga
programme.desc: With the Bentley Bentayga, the traditional British brand is entering the fastest growing market segment. This world's first luxury SUV is a conglomerate of superlatives on wheels.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: BMW and the German racing team X-Raid take part in the Dakar Rally with a transformed Mini Countryman. Also: the Mercedes G63 AMG 6x6, a 6-wheel off-road monster. And: the Kia Sportage feels both at home in the rocky terrain of Sicily and the city.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: City-SUVs are the latest trend in the automotive world. The Subaru XV shows its offroad skills, and the Nissan Juke is taken to the race track in Dubai. And: the Mercedes-AMG and the Audi RS Q3 GLA face each other in the mountains.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: The Land Rover Defender is one of the oldest offroad car models. We took a look at this iconic vehicle and 70 years of Land Rover history. Also: we took the Range Rover Evoque, the most recent model of the British brand, to the legendary Silk Road.

programme.title: Mitsubishi Lancer Evo 10
programme.desc: The ice course on Lungauring, the Mitsubishi Lancer Evo 10 in winter training. Twelve participants in six Evos were taught the art of drifting with a four-wheel drive car. We accompanied a student on his first drifting experience.

programme.title: Jeep Renegade
programme.desc: Jeep has been building SUVs since 1942. The Jeep Renegade comes from a traditional home. It is the youngest representative of the family and the most successful.

programme.title: BMW Active Hybrid 7
programme.desc: With the Active Hybrid 7, unlike with its predecessor bearing the same model name, BMW now banks on a full hybrid, which can also be driven solely with electric power.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.desc: Winning the iconic Dakar Rally for a record 13 times, Frenchman Stéphane Peterhansel had a rather unusual career as he switched from motorbikes to cars and was enormously successful with both vehicles.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.desc: Alois Ruf is the founder of a small, but well-known car manufacturing company in Bavaria that specialises in building their own vision of street legal super sports cars on the foundation of Porsche bodys.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.desc: From the 1950s to 1970s Hans Herrmann came to fame as a successful Formula 1 and sportscar driver for manufacturers like Porsche, Mercedes-Benz and Maserati who also won also the 24 Hours of Le Mans several times.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.desc: People called her the "Queen of the Nordschleife" when she used to drive her Porsche or BMW racing cars at the Nürburgring's famous Nordschleife. Sabine Schmitz was a successful racing driver before she took a career turn by working as a TV presenter.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: We were allowed to drive a car of Citroen's sub-brand DS who try to set foot in the Formula E. In addition: Citroen and Peugeot share the same platform with their Rifter and Berlingo models. And: the facelift of the 508, Peugeot's flagship car.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Eager to overcome the damage to their image following the diesel scandal, Volkswagen allowed exclusive sneak peaks into future developments. We took their T-Cross on a covered drive. In addition: a first glance at Audi's A1 and A6 models.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: We compared the Ford Mustang 2.3 EcoBoost turbo to BMW's 430i with similar engine and drive specs. Also: Lada tries to take on Dacia with their Vesta SW station wagon. And: Opel's Grandland X may be an SUV, but it doesn't offer an all-wheel drive.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Is Kia's visually exciting Stinger able to convince in our test? In addition: we explored how Subaru's Boxer engine concept works in their XV model. And: Hyundai i30N vs. Volkswagen Golf GTI.

programme.title: Ford GT40
programme.desc: With their V8 cars, Ford showed that they were able to build race winners. The Ford GT40 was a prime example for that, especially in Le Mans.

programme.title: Car History
programme.sub-title: The Story of Automotive Advertising, Part 1
programme.desc: No consumer good is fought over as fiercely and as cost-intensively as the car. No sooner had the first car been launched in 1886 than advertising began touting the great benefits of the motor car for mankind. Part 1 of 3.

programme.title: Car History
programme.sub-title: The Story of Automotive Advertising, Part 2
programme.desc: In the 1970s and 80s, car production booms and with it car advertising. Television advertising for cars picks up speed. Even the oil crisis cannot stop worldwide car production or the corresponding advertising. Part 2 of 3.

programme.title: Car History
programme.sub-title: The Story of Automotive Advertising, Part 3
programme.desc: In no other industry is marketing as important as in the automotive industry. Brands, models and advertising campaigns have been closely intertwined for decades. How has car advertising developed since the 1990s? Part 3 of 3.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: The Chevrolet Corvette is the best-selling sports car in the world. It belongs to the USA like the Statue of Liberty, the Superbowl and John Wayne. Since its market launch the Corvette has developed into an automotive icon.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: 50 years of Porsche 911, 60 years of Chevrolet Corvette: two legends, two myths, two dream cars, and two philosophies. The Porsche 911 and the Chevrolet Corvette are the sports car icons in Europe and the USA.

programme.title: Concorso d'Eleganza at Lake Como
programme.desc: Lake Como is home to a very special classic car meeting: the Concorso d'Eleganza. For decades, the rich and beautiful have met here with their beautiful and valuable cars - the unique classics of automobile history.

programme.title: Wanderer Stromlinie Spezial
programme.desc: Founded in 1885, the Wanderer-Werke AG was one of the three biggest German car manufacturing companies at the time of WWII. The three remaining original Wanderer Stromlinie Spezial racing cars were lost in the turmoil of the war, but Audi ordered specialist Werner Zinke to create replicas of these three iconic classic cars.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The Stunt Heroes team plan to create a clash between man and machine. For a stunt showreel one of Action Concept's stunt people will be facing a new BMW 3 series in an action-packed chase.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: It's getting hot in this episode of Stunt Heroes. Stuntman Paul will be engulfed by flames as everything around him blows up in this dangerous fire stunt. The Action Concept team carefully prepares for this heated scene.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: For a showreel, the team choreographs a fight that involves hand-to-hand combat, glass bottles shattering on heads and bodies crashing through walls. In the end, a car flies high, detonates in the air, leaving a trail of destruction.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Action Concept wreck more than 100 cars each year for their stunts. In this episode, a quad rider is chased by a car. The car is crashed in the process and the quad bike also has to be destroyed, but the question is how?

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: In this episode of Stunt Heroes, it's all about stunt driver Christoph Knobloch. He drives down a ramp and crashes into cars stacked on top of each other while several petrol barrels explode at the same time.

programme.title: Harley-Davidson Trio
programme.desc: We took a look at three very different Harley-Davidson models. The versatile Switchback Dyna, the motorized wheelie bike Sportster 72, and the bad-boy motorcycle Softail Slim.

programme.title: Rimac Concept One
programme.desc: The futuristically designed Rimac Concept One is one of the fastest, most powerful and expensive electric cars in the world, it does not adhere to convention.

programme.title: Bentley Bentayga
programme.desc: With the Bentley Bentayga, the traditional British brand is entering the fastest growing market segment. This world's first luxury SUV is a conglomerate of superlatives on wheels.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: The IAA in Frankfurt is the largest motor show in the world. More than 900 exhibitors present their new products in 11 halls and on 14 outdoor areas. Here you can marvel at tomorrow's trends today.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: The tuning forge SKN from Benstorf is organising a Dyno Day for the second time. Also: Lorinser refines the Mercedes E 500 Coupé. And: an invitation to Raeder Motorsport.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: Patrick Simon tests the Aston Martin Zagato on the Grand Prix circuit. Also: Renault Megane Sport vs. Golf GTI Edition 35. And: the Porsche 997 and 994 on the Nordschleife.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: Once a year, Las Vegas hosts the largest car and tuning trade show in the world - the SEMA Show. We show the highlights from hot rods to custom cars.

programme.title: Tuning

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: The Essen Motor Show is the event for automobile and motor sports enthusiasts. Over 300,000 visitors flock here every year and bring the hallowed halls to a boil.

programme.title: Porsche Ruf RT35
programme.desc: Ruf RT35 may look like a Porsche, but it really isn't. Since 1981, the Ruf company in Pfaffhausen, Germany, has been recognized as an independent manufacturer. But the basis for its vehicles comes exclusively from Porsche. A Ruf is even faster and more exclusive than a comparable Porsche.

programme.title: PicklePod
programme.sub-title: Ben Johns Goes Deep on Latest Pickleball Drama
programme.desc: Time to check in with pickleball GOAT Ben Johns. Ben took to Twitter to address the paddle delamination issue. He goes deeper into how to test for delamination and why power is a problem. We touch on all the controversies facing the pro game including white paddles, match schedules, and rule changes. After the physics lesson, Ben explains some of the history surrounding pickleball’s OG’s. You can’t miss this episode with pickleball’s top dog.

Powder TV: Explore
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes with Sherpas Cinema as they travel to Bella Coola, the Shangri-La of ski terrain, which has been largely left untouched for the last decade. Sherpas Cinema dropped in to Bella Coola last year to film "Into The Mind" with some heavy hitters including Kye Petersen, Callum Pettit, and JP Auclair. In this episode, brought to you by POWDER TV and Sherpas Cinema, the athletes and directors share their thoughts on the power of the mountains, as well as the challenges and rewards they experienced while filming in Bella Coola.

programme.title: Powder TV: Playlist Episode Block 1
programme.desc: PowderTV is a captivating series that offers immersive recaps of the exhilarating skiing experiences, gear reviews, and mountain culture stories showcased in Powder magazine.

programme.title: Powder TV: Playlist Episode Block 8
programme.desc: PowderTV is a captivating series that offers immersive recaps of the exhilarating skiing experiences, gear reviews, and mountain culture stories showcased in Powder magazine.

programme.title: The Montana Way
programme.desc: Every time the powder falls, any skier knows it's time to drop everything and head to the hill. For pro skier Marcus Caston, an early-season dump in Montana spurred the Salt Lake City resident to head out to a spot that he'd never been to before and see what Montana’s mountains have to offer.

programme.title: Powder TV: Playlist Episode Block 7
programme.desc: PowderTV is a captivating series that offers immersive recaps of the exhilarating skiing experiences, gear reviews, and mountain culture stories showcased in Powder magazine.

programme.title: Shaped by Descent
programme.desc: Shaped by Descent follows Lexi DuPont, in Haines, Alaska. Through the film we watch Lexi overcome the trials and tribulations that come with skiing as she evolves into one of the best female big mountain skiers on the planet.

programme.title: Powder TV: Iconic Lifts
programme.desc: In Iconic Lifts, a Powder Productions Original, Mad River Glen's Single Chair, Whistler's Peak Express, and Snowbird's Aerial Tram and more are the featured lifts. Their influence on skiers provides an unforgettable experience.

programme.title: Powder TV: Monumental
programme.desc: From the multimedia digital feature, Monumental: Skiing Our National Parks, presented by REI Co-Op, is a video of skiing in Grand Teton National Park. .

programme.title: Between Fjords
programme.desc: Czech twins Filip & Lukas Polach embrace Iceland's beauty & ruggedness, finding new life meaning and perception of time in its wilderness.

programme.title: Fresh Tracks
programme.desc: Doc recounts WWII vet Paul Leimkuehler's journey: lost leg, built own prosthetic, pioneered adaptive skiing with first US ski outriggers, inspiring sports return.

programme.title: Winterland
programme.desc: Winterland is Teton Gravity Researchs 2019 celebration of ski and snowboard culture, exploring the fruits of a productive winter season in new zones all over the world.

programme.title: For Lack of Better
programme.desc: These "street skiers" dedicate their lives to traveling from city to city pushing the limits of what is possible on skis in urban environments. Filmmaker Clayton Vila takes you behind the scenes into a winter with these unique professional skiers.

programme.title: The Stomping Grounds
programme.desc: This action-packed feature explores the backyards and zones our pro skiers can frequent every day (sometimes with a little extra effort and ingenuity).

programme.title: Romance
programme.desc: Romance, the final chapter by Level 1 captures a modern-day Golden Age in skiing. Featuring a generation of talent that came of age in the best time to ever do it. Tweaking the formula, tweaking the grab, and in it for nothing but the love.

programme.title: Shaun Palmer: The Miserable Champion
programme.desc: The Miserable Champion is a shocking portrait of one of the most notorious athletes of all-time, action sports hero Shaun Palmer. This tell-all movie reveals Shaun from birth to the near fatal overdose to his comeback to make the 2006 Olympic Team.

programme.title: The Man Boys
programme.desc: Amongst the worlds most striking mountainscapes, and upon the mean streets of the urban frontcountry, this band of pals, The Manboys, perform risky snowboarding maneuvers off features theyve built by hand, with love and sometimes shovels.

programme.title: Powder TV: All Time
programme.desc: Exploring some of the greatest Skii conditions recorded at some of the most iconic mountains in the world.

programme.title: The Great Siberian Traverse
programme.desc: The Great Siberian Traverse documents a 6,000-mile ski journey through Russia, along the Trans-Siberian Railway. The documentary - created in collaboration with POWDER and Sherpas Cinema - showcases a fringe back-country skiing community, deep Siberian powder, and skiing’s ancient origins. Team skiers Ingrid Backstrom, Callum Pettit, and Nick Martini share their insights along the adventure.

programme.title: The Sky Piercer
programme.desc: In 'Sky Piercer,' champions Xavier De le Rue & Nadine Wallner join local Sam Smoothy to conquer NZ's Mt. Cook. With unpredictable weather, the challenge intensifies.

programme.title: Powder TV: Behind The Cover
programme.desc: A look into the decision making, thoughts, and absurdities that go into the cover and some of the features of POWDER.

programme.title: Powder TV: Powder Week
programme.desc: POWDER week in Jackson Hole, Wyoming is hands down the best week of the year. Each year, a few lucky skiers get to join the crew for a week of skiing and partying.

programme.title: Symphony on Skis
programme.desc: Sisters trace father's ski journey in New Zealand's pristine landscapes. 30 years ago, Gottlieb Braun-Elwert traversed 40km of Southern Alps in 18 hours.

programme.title: Petit Suisse
programme.desc: Swiss prodigy Maxime Chabloz conquers world titles in skiing & kite-surfing. A tale of sports triumph intertwined with human emotion & pursuit of dreams.

programme.title: Sierra Quitiquit: How Did I Get Here
programme.desc: How Did I Get Here is a coming-of-age story, full of adventure, exploration, heartbreak, growth and inspiration.

programme.title: The Ordinary Skier
programme.desc: For Seth Morrison, skiing is much more than a sport or job, it's a way of life. The story of how a collection of misfits turned an elite sport upside down, and how an ordinary kid chased his dream and became one of skiing's most iconic heroes.

programme.title: Powder TV: Passing Through
programme.desc: From Powder Productions, Passing Through returns for the 2018-19 season, kicking off with a profile of Washington's Crystal Mountain Resort. This profile and series offers a quick perspective on stashes to ski, chairs to lap, bars to après, food, and accommodations. In this episode, we travel a few hours southeast of Seattle to Crystal to explore the skiing and scene on and off the hill at one of the best ski areas in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: The Montana Way
programme.desc: Every time the powder falls, any skier knows it's time to drop everything and head to the hill. For pro skier Marcus Caston, an early-season dump in Montana spurred the Salt Lake City resident to head out to a spot that he'd never been to before and see what Montana’s mountains have to offer.

programme.title: Shangku Shelter
programme.desc: Shangku Shelter: Two decades of skiing adventure, friendship, & social change in Zanskar, Indian Himalaya. 10,000 locals endure 6-month snow isolation yearly.

programme.title: Rookies
programme.desc: Rookies' tracks 4 freeride skiing novices on global stage. Balancing documentary with ski film, it follows Verbier's Elisabeth Gerritzen, Carl Renvall, Yann Rausis & NZ's Sam Lee.

programme.title: The Unrideables: Alaska Range
programme.desc: In The Unrideables: Alaska Range, the worlds foremost expert on human flight, Jon Devore, sets out with a team of elite aerial athletes to evolve the sport of Speedriding.

programme.title: Laila

Years later, Prithviraj's son Dharamraj gets married to Sunaina, who gives birth to a baby boy named Deshraj. When Prithviraj tries to settle the issues between the families, he gets poisoned by his chauffeur, Chandu, who was bribed and manipulated by Bharat and his men. On knowing this, Dharamraj poisons Chandu and sends Deshraj to the U.S. to continue his studies in a safer atmosphere. Years later, Deshraj returns home and ens up falling for a young woman named Leela, who is none other than Chandu's daughter. Fearing for his son's life, Dharamraj puts forward a proposal to Bharat. What could the proposal be?

programme.title: Angling Buzz - Fishing for Summertime Bluegill and Crappie
programme.desc: Don't sleep on the summer panfish bite! The lion's share of panfishing occurs during the springtime when the fish are concentrated in the shallow waters and also in the winter, but summertime can be absolutely fantastic for bluegill and crappie. Just like other gamefish, they can make dramatic seasonal movements and you'll need to find them first before you can catch them. Today, we're joined by panfish aficionado Joel Nelson.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S10 E12 | Studio 52 - Episode 12
programme.desc: Can 9-time NHL All-Star Jeremy Roenick use his aggressive and competitive spirit to outwit a table full of poker sharks or will he be a fish out of water? Watch Jeremy at the Poker Night in America Studio 52 cash game with Jason Somerville, Scott Ball, Jeremiah Williams, Terrance Reid, Jesse Sylvia and Nick Marchington.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E08 | Sugar And Spice
programme.desc: The poker spices up as the night winds down at SugarHouse Casino in Philadelphia, PA. Featuring Kyle Bowker, Todd Brunson, Akim Akimov, Mike Sigel, Matt Brady, Shaun Deeb, and Thai Ha

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E40 | Straight Shooter
programme.desc: Phil Laak puts his chips in with "delicate, consistent, well-appointed strength" from Seminole Hard Rock Casino Resort in Hollywood, Florida. Featuring Mukul Pahuja, Matt Salsberg, Matt Affleck, Phil Laak, Dan Shak, Esther Taylor, Asher Conniff

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E09 | Face Up With E-Tay
programme.desc: We return to Hollywood, Florida to visit the Seminole Hard Rock Hotel and Casino, plus we showcase the first segment of our in-depth interview with Esther Taylor. Featuring Cate Hall, Jason Mercier, Jennifer Tilly, Stewart Newman, Wendeen Eolis, Esther Taylor, and Tim Reilly.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E41 | Ladies Night III
programme.desc: Back by popular demand, we invited just the ladies to Seminole Hard Rock in Hollywood, Florida, for a night of poker with considerably less body hair around the table. Featuring Vanessa Rousso, Esther Taylor, Samantha Abernathy, Danielle Anderson, Abbey Daniels, Natasha Mercier, Stacey Sullivan

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E10 | Charitable Donations
programme.desc: Jason Mercier makes a "donation" to the table as our first day of filming at Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino in Hollywood, FL comes to a close. Featuring Cate Hall, Jason Mercier, Jennifer Tilly, Stewart Newman, Wendeen Eolis, Esther Taylor, and Tim Reilly

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E42 | Ace Race
programme.desc: Ladies Night III continues from Seminole Hard Rock in Hollywood, Florida. Featuring Vanessa Rousso, Esther Taylor, Samantha Abernathy, Danielle Anderson, Abbey Daniels, Natasha Mercier, Stacey Sullivan

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E11 | Cranberries
programme.desc: We begin our second day of filming cash game action at Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino in Hollywood, FL. Featuring Tom Marchese, Jessica Dawley, Matt Berkey, Jennifer Tilly, Dan O'Brien, Aaron Mermelstein, and Dan Suied

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E01 | Face Up With Jennifer Tilly
programme.desc: We showcase cash game action from Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh, PA. Plus, we do our first in-depth interview with Jennifer Tilly. Featuring Jennifer Tilly, Matt Glantz, Bobby Noel, Jack Schanbacher, Shaun Deeb, Maria Ho, Jason Andrews, Griffin Abel, Dave Eldrige

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E12 | Woe Is Stapes
programme.desc: Our exclusive cash game continues from Seminole Hard Rock from Hollywood, FL, with some tough cards hitting the community, but it seems to hit Joe Stapleton hardest of all. Featuring Tom Marchese, Jessica Dawley, Matt Berkey, Jennifer Tilly, Dan O'Brien, Aaron Mermelstein, and Dan Suied

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E02 | Any Two Cards
programme.desc: Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh, PA hosts our cash game while our invited pros start to play a little loose. Also, we show Part 2 of our in-depth interview with Jennifer Tilly. Featuring Matt Brady, Alec Torelli, Jennifer Tilly, Jack Schanbacher, Shaun Deeb, Daniel Wolf, Dave Eldridge, Matt Glantz, Bobby Noel, Jason Andrews

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E13 | The Man With The Biggest Stack
programme.desc: Brad Garrett joins our table at Seminole Hard Rock in Hollywood, FL. Can he hold his own against the pros? He's certainly got a big enough chip stack! Featuring Brad Garrett, Jennifer Tilly, Jason Mercier, Kyle Bowker, Brandon Adams, Ryan Fee, and Eric Wasserson

programme.title: Poker Night TV

programme.title: World Series of Poker
programme.desc: The biggest No-Limit Hold'em buy-in of the 2004 WSOP outside of the Main Event would attract 254 entrants and create a prize pool of $1,193,800. programme.title: It was 10 Tough Years - Guenther Steiner's Explains his Haas Exit
programme.desc: Following the news that Guenther Steiner has departed Haas following a 10-year partnership with the team, Guenther took to the stage at the Autosport International show to explain his side of the shocking story.

programme.title: British GT
programme.desc: Watch the racing action from round 7 of the 2024 British GT championship at Snetterton.

programme.title: Belgian Rally Championship
programme.desc: The 59th Ardeca Ypres Rally, the sixth round of the Belgian rally championship, remained exciting until the absolute final phase. The pace was particularly high at the front, which caused a lot of slips and mistakes. Even the winner did not remain flawless. Yet Stéphane Lefebvre was clearly the fastest. The 32-year-old Nordist, who as a child was a fascinated spectator watching the rally cars in Ypres, won with a lead of 40″46 over Maxime Potty, while Cédric Cherain finished third.

programme.title: Porsche Cup Brasil

programme.title: It was 10 Tough Years - Guenther Steiner's Explains his Haas Exit

programme.title: Behind The Visor with Nico Hülkenberg
programme.desc: He may have taken 3 years out of full-time F1, but Nico Hülkenberg certainly hasn't lost the motivation to push himself. Earlier in the year, we caught up with the Hulk himself, where Nico opens up on his early retirement the first time around, his comeback with Haas and his future with Audi in F1.

programme.title: FIA Karting
programme.desc: Apart from a spell of rain late on Saturday, the MotorLand Aragón track provided good grip for the powerful machines competing. The Dunlop tyres performed well in all three categories, whatever the conditions. With its width, the 1,671-metre-long Spanish track enabled plenty of overtaking in all the races, while remaining highly selective. The Spanish organising team showed great skill and much appreciated personal qualities.

programme.title: Gordon Murray: Designing brilliance
programme.desc: Renowned designer Gordon Murray shares all with Peter Windsor, detailing his life and involvement with the Brabham and McLaren team, including the legendary fan car and McLaren MP4/4

programme.title: Spa Classic 2024
programme.desc: Catch up on all the highlights from the 2024 Spa Classic.

programme.title: 2024 Desafio Ruta 40: Full Review
programme.desc: Welcome to Argentina for the 12th edition of Desafio Ruta 40! After being rebooted last year as part of the World Rally-Raid Championship, this event has quickly established itself as one of the best on the calendar. The world’s top riders and drivers are back as Ruta 40 gets underway in the rally-mad city of Cordoba… after a short prologue, they will battle it out over five exhilarating stages.

programme.title: F1 2024 The Season So Far - Surprises and Disappointments
programme.desc: From what seemed like a forgone conclusion at the start of the season, with Max Verstappen and Red Bull winning 7 of the 10 opening races, has quickly turned on its head with the rest of the field fast approaching. With the early season pace of Ferrari faltering, and McLaren charging to the head of the field to challenge Red Bull, and Mercedes coming up as well, this is the review of the first half of the 2024 Formula 1 season.

programme.desc: Carson and Zach chase big honkers and mallards in a dry field in their back yard in Indiana.

programme.title: Wentz Brother's Outdoors
programme.desc: Zach is back to the homeland for Part 3 of chasing ducks.

programme.title: Wentz Brother's Outdoors
programme.desc: Carson and Zach Wentz head south to Arkansas to chase green heads in flooded timber.

programme.title: Wentz Brother's Outdoors
programme.desc: Zach and Carson Wentz head to Texas for their annual hunt with the Nature’s Eye crew.

programme.title: Wentz Brother's Outdoors
programme.desc: Zach is hunting North Dakota hoping to fill his first mule deer tag with his Hoyt bow.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Over the years we have been able to hunt with a lot of amazing people. This episode takes us to Las Palmas ranch to hunt with Payton Angelle. Payton was awarded this hunt from the amazing people over at Sky High for kids.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Follow TTHA President/CEO Christina Pittman and her husband Matt this week as they chase Whitetails at Morrow Ranch. This is a hunt that they had purchased earlier at the Disabled Outdoorsman in the year to be able to spend some time in the woods. A few days away to relax and spend quality time with loved ones should always be a priority. Morrow Ranch is definitely a go to place for low fence Texas hunting.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: We love our college chapters. Hudson has been a long time member of TTHA as well as serving with the Texas A&M Chapter. We have a great time at G2 in pursuit of Axis deer.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Josh Kinser from Big and J introduced his daughters to hunting throughout South TX. With trips earlier in the year cancelled, Josh and Hattie were invited to join the TTHA crew at G2 ranch. The first night of the hunt proved to be a success for Hattie, wrapping a TX tag around her biggest buck. Josh and Hattie will have memories to last a lifetime after this hunt!

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Denise Sanchez was awarded a hunt at G2 following our Hunters Extravaganza drawings. Its great to get to spend time on the ranch with new members of TTHA. Denise gets familiar with a giant and learns about new technology while on this hunt.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: We love our members. We spent some time in camp with Ron Chandler. Ron Recently renewed his TTHA Membership in 2022 and was awarded a member hunt for 2023. We spend time reflecting on what hunting means to Ron and spending time in camp at G2 with hunters alike.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: We find ourselves fishing with Troy from Lonestar Beer. Not only is Troy a great friend he is also a big supporter of Hunters Extravaganza. We get to catch up in the offseason and spend a day on the water discussing future events and reflect on what all Texas has to offer.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Six Mile Hill Ranch in Crowell, TX plays host to our TTHA Crew this week while we learn how Courtney Shaheen grew up in the outdoors and ultimately pursued her career as a Taxidermist. Courtney shares her path to becoming a world class taxidermist with Double Nickel Taxidermy and she even gets to take her biggest buck to date with the Six Mile Hill crew!

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Cable is a huge supporter of Texas Hunting and everything Teas Trophy Hunters. We are blessed to spend a few days with hum at the beautiful Saddle Creek Ranch in Brady Texas. Greg has a tight management plan and we are glad we got to enjoy his ranch with him and his team.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: The bond between and parent and child can grow in many ways, but nothing compares to the bond shared when hunting. The annual Father-Son hunt at FE Hill Outfitters has becoming a tradition for Heath and his son Gavin and in 2021, Gavin was able to take his largest buck to date, with his dad Heath behind the camera.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: WE join Bobby Falkenberg as he joins Bret Ferguson from Double T Outfitters. Bobby is an avid outdoorsman, judge, and father of 5. Bret manages 30,000 acres in Ozona TX, the knowledge he has of every inch of this amazing low fence ranch is remarkable. Bobby has an action packed 2 day hunt.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: In 2010, Amberly Snyder’s life changed forever when an accident left her paralyzed from the waist-down. Her comeback story not unlike something you’d see in a movie…in fact it inspired one. Disabled Outdoorsmen USA contacted TTHA and set up this hunt and we were fortunate enough to be able to capture just some of Amberly’s story and her harvest of a beautiful Axis buck at the G2 Ranch in the spring of 2022.

programme.title: Into The Blue
programme.desc: Capt. Scott Walker and Capt. Steve Rodger launch from the incomparable Oceans Edge Resort in Key West, Florida to hunt down all kinds of sport fish.

programme.title: Into The Blue
programme.desc: Capt. Scott Walker and Capt. Steve Rodger take off from the beautiful Ocean's Edge Marina in Key West, Florida.

programme.title: Into The Blue
programme.desc: Capt. Scott Walker and Capt. Steve Rodger meet up with Brice Barr to head out into the beautiful waters of Gulf in search of giants.

programme.title: Into The Blue
programme.desc: The waters surrounding Ocean's Edge Resort on Key West, Florida provide no shortage of beautiful fishing area. Capt Scot Walker and Capt. Steve Rodger meet up with good friend and commercial fisherman John Buckheim of Keys Fresh Seafood market to haul in some delicious sport fish.

programme.title: Into The Blue
programme.desc: Scott and Steve take of from the georgeous Sailfish Marina in Palm Beach, FL to hunt down big ones in the waters off the Florida Coast

programme.title: Into The Blue
programme.desc: Captain Scott Walker and Captain Steve Rodger meet up with Dave Fields for a beautiful calm morning at Sailfish Marina. The trio run into a multitude of sport fish species and see just all of what the Florida Keys have to offer.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: Rush and Ali head to La Paz Mexico to fish with longtime friends and soak up some Baja living in the City of Peace. In part one of this two part series, the guys fish offshore targeting striped marlin and dorado with a few surprises.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: The La Paz adventure continues as Rush and Ali get a better understanding - of the town (and its taco spots), before heading out for some inshore fishing, targeting roosterfish and - snapper.

programme.title: Their Life My Lens
programme.desc: Bryce and Chasten go inshore fishing and try to get Bryce on his first ever redfish.

programme.title: Their Life My Lens
programme.desc: Sometimes it's not all about the fish. Chasten and Levi head out for a relaxing day on the water, with a few fish in mind.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Similar to any good Cajun dish, a successful duck camp requires preparation. The last day on dry land is filled with essential stops to get ready for 5 days on the Bayou. Whether making sure we have the right ingredients for our favorite meals, or getting the boats brushed up and ready for action, the day before can be just as important as the day of.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Tune in as Jean-Paul and the crew share their first day full day at duck camp with a morning in the duck blind and catfish on the jug line. At the end of the day they put their Cajun grocery goods together for an epic duck camp meal.

programme.title: The Reel American Road Trip
programme.desc: Danny meets up with Chef Dave in the Golden Ilse to target Reds and Trout. Then head to Halyards to cook the catch.

programme.title: The Reel American Road Trip
programme.desc: Danny tries his hand at the seine net to catch some shrimp. Then meets up with Chef Dave to cook up some amazing Shrimp and Grits. After, Travel to Jekyll Island for the Shrimp and Grits Festival.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.sub-title: DIRT - "Alaskan Fishing, Foraging, & Mountainside Cooking with Local Legends"
programme.desc: Hop in the float plane—a new episode of DIRT just dropped. The DIRT crew made their way to Alaska, “the land of earth, sea, and sky.” All feast, no sleep is the name of the game as Josh makes the most of Alaska’s abundant and legendary daylight alongside local guides, fishermen, and even a couple grizzlies. There’ll be plenty of time to hibernate in winter. But for now—join us—there are halibut to filet, rainforest ’shrooms to forage, and mountainside meals to cook up.

programme.title: The Bearded Buck
programme.desc: After starting off the fall on the road, Jerry and Austin are back in PA to hunt whitetails on their home turf. With a whole off-season of scouting and land preparation behind them, they're hoping to cash in on all this hard work.

programme.title: Blair Wiggins Outdoors
programme.desc: Blair and Capt. John Beach catch Grouper and Snapper off the coast of - Homosassa, FL

programme.title: Deer and Deer Hunting
programme.desc: Dan Schmidt heads to Nebraska to talk to the experts at Hornady ammunition and get their take and what the best calibers are for whitetail deer hunting.
Follow Team200’s crew of traditional archers as they chase big - whitetails in Canada!
Team200 partners with Asio Gear this year and follows previous - Team200 Prostaffer and owner of Asio Joe Miles, through his 2022 - season as he chases big whitetails across the midwest and - Mexico!
This week we follow Clay Charlton, owner of Take-Em Outfitters in - Alberta Canada, as he chases big Canadian Bucks, Giant Black - Bear and a Grizzly!
Tarif Alkhatibs is new to Team200, but no stranger to killing some - of the biggest free range whitetails in his home state of Texas – - including the state record typical!
Adam Hays is no stranger to world class bucks, but last year it - took patience and determination to harvest this Illinois giant with - 3 days left in the season!

Team200 takes an in depth look at bowhunting’s million dollar question. How do you predict what a mature buck is going to do before he actually does it? Get the answer and see some world class animals harvested on the Red Moon.

Team200 visits the Cree River Lodge in northern Saskatchewan to hunt - giant black bear. Spot and stalk archery action plus fishing for giant - Northern Pike!

programme.title: Primos
programme.desc: Team Primos chases whitetail deer at our home camp, Kudzu Bluff, on the edge of the MS Delta.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: The positive impact made by the shooting sports and recreational shooting to people across our country can’t be measured in just one story, so we have three. In Florida, Olympian Dania Vizzi trains at her home shooting facility and talk about how she went from ballerina to one of the best shotgun shooters in the world. In Nebraska, firearms instructor Thea Van Syoc has used the disciplines of competitive pistol shooting and training to help shape her life. Finally we’ll take a look into the National African American Gun Association and learn how one day at the range for Phillip Smith created the fastest growing firearm organization in the United States.

programme.desc: Curtis & his family remain in Casper Wyoming for PT 2. This show is filled with great adventures and fishing stories Curtis & the team will never forget, from getting caught in a wind storm to looking like Brad Pitt in a River Runs Through It. This is one show you have to watch!

Events like the Hercules Hold, Yoke Race and pulling a real Viking ship are some of the ingredients of this fantastic show.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The second stage of Strongman champions league will be hosted in Germany, by FIBO - the leading international trade show for fitness, wellness and health worldwide with 300,000 visitors in four days. Special implements like the biggest log in the world or the special Bavarian stone lift are not only a challenge, but also an opportunity for new personal, national and world records.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League

programme.title: Strongman Champions League

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Krzysztof Radzikowski, the leader in the league will fight hard to keep Dainis Zageris off from the title and to gather another 25 ranking points in this next stage in Latvia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The competition sees a close battle with a new world record in overhead dumbbell and close finishes throughout the day. This stage is in Croatia, in a city over 1700 years old, steeped in Roman tradition and history, the athletes arrive for the truck pull after a picturesque boat ride on the Adriatic Sea.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are now half way through the SCL 2015 and getting closer to the grand world finals in Turkey. The eighth stage is in Poland, the home country of the current leader Krzysztof Radzikowski.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this stage we go into the mountains of Austria to find out through six grueling events who is the strongest in the land of Alps. Martin Wildauer, current World Champion 2014 and Austrian local is competing alongside Zageris, Radzikowski, Belsak and many others.
