programme.desc: Today we graduate. The guestshave a day of pampering. The get ready to leave and we hold a graduation for the guest

programme.desc: Mark visits the Culinary School at the Mississippi University for Women to check out the program and learns a few lessons in their kitchen.

programme.title: Making A Chef S2 Ep7 -- Fighting Poverty With Food
programme.desc: Mark and Chef Nick Wallace help with the Mississippi Food Network Moonlight Market fundraiser in Jackson, Mississippi.

programme.title: Eat The Pizza -- Episode 11
programme.desc: Christian and Alyssia have a sweet tooth and create Pizza Fudge, Pizza Ice Cream, and Pizza Meringue.

programme.title: The World Is Yours
programme.desc: In this episode we will travel to New York, to see its most famous skyscrapers, we'll go on an incredibly fun bike ride through Manhattan, there we will have a test of New Yorks gastronomy. And before we say goodbye to this location well visit the Statue of Liberty. Then we will visit the city of Pamplona, in Spain, we'll do a walking tour of its streets, play a little Vasque ball, we'll see the Basilica of San Ignacio de Loyola and attend the San Fermin festivities, where we will be running with the bulls. Finally, we returned to the tropical latitudes in Ecuador, where we visited the Galapagos Islands. We will have close encounters with the Galapagos, and other fauna and vegetation unique to this place. At the Charles Darwin Research Station they will explain everything there is to know about giant tortoises and in Puerto Ayora we will say our goodbyes to South America on Santa Cruz Island.

programme.title: 30 Minute Tour
programme.desc: Zanzibar Island and Pemba Island boast some of the world's most beautiful coastlines, with an emphasis on luxury and relaxation.

programme.title: Painting The Town
programme.desc: Folk artist Eric Dowdle travels across North America, meeting the local people, sampling food, learning about culture and touring local attractions in an effort to determine what makes each place unique. Each episode culminates in the creation of a piece of colorful folk art that symbolizes the place Dowdle has visited.

programme.title: The World's Greatest Cities of The World
programme.sub-title: The World's Greatest Cities of The World: Athens, Lima, Helsinki, Doha, Munich, Barcelona, Milan,
programme.desc: Your first class ticket to the cities of the world. This series features large and small cities from around the world to reveal their icons, culture, tourist and hidden highlights with information about local customs, the cities personality and history.

programme.title: Islands Without Cars
programme.desc: The Aeolian Islands are a volcanic archipelago in the Tyrrhenian Sea north of Sicily. Kira explores Salina, Alicudi, Panarea, Stromboli, and Lipari--Each island bustling with a surprising array of personalities and professions.

programme.title: Islands Without Cars
programme.desc: Over a thousand unique and beautiful islands dot Croatia's incomparable Dalmatian coast. Kira explores the tiny island of Zlarin (known for its coral) and the even smaller island of Krapanj, celebrated for its history of sponge harvesting.

programme.title: Islands Without Cars
programme.desc: Located in the Aegean Sea between the Saronic Gulf and the Argolic Gulf; Hydra is the only developed Greek island with a ban on cars. Kira talks with artists and expatriates while learning about the history of the unique island.

programme.title: Islands Without Cars
programme.desc: Inis Meain is the middle of the three Aran Islands in Galway Bay on the west coast of Ireland. Home to the Inis Meain Knitting Company, and a population of only 160; Kira explores the remote island that has inspired writers and artists.

programme.title: Islands Without Cars
programme.desc: Sark is a small island in the Channel Islands in southwestern English Channel, off the French coast of Normandy. Kira talks with a feudal lord, a choclatier, a rocking horse carver and a hotel operator--all bustling with island charm.

programme.title: Islands Without Cars
programme.desc: A short distance from France's Cote d'Azur; the island of Porquerolles is lined with cliffs, beaches, and renowned for having the best weather in France. Kira explores the Island's history and conservation efforts by talking with locals.

programme.title: Islands Without Cars
programme.desc: Part of the West Frisian Islands, Schiermonnikoog is a tiny island off the northern coast of Holland: a quiet getaway for the Dutch and a miraculously untouched secret for everyone else.

programme.title: Islands Without Cars
programme.desc: The Island boasts a Victorian tranquility unlike anywhere else in the United States. The roads are run by horse and buggies, the cuisine is centered around homemade fudge, and the views are infused with America's historical mythologies.

programme.title: Islands Without Cars
programme.desc: Just a short ferry ride away from the vibrant university town of Gothenburg is Sweden’s Southwestern Archipelago.

programme.title: Islands Without Cars
programme.desc: Long considered the most beautiful and romantic city in the world, Venice is Europe's largest urban car-free area while nearby Burano is home to generations of lace makers, artists, and fishermen; all living in colorfully curated houses.

programme.title: Islands Without Cars
programme.desc: A rocky island in the North Sea and Germany's only non-coastal island. Following WWII, Helgoland was rebuilt and turned into a popular tourist destination. Kira explores the history and favorite activities of locals and tourists alike.

programme.title: Islands Without Cars
programme.desc: Easdale is the smallest permanently inhabited island off Scotland's West coast and is home to a world-famous stone skimming competition while Eigg features beautiful moors, beaches composed of white quartz and historic ruins.

programme.title: Islands Without Cars
programme.desc: The Aeolian Islands are a volcanic archipelago in the Tyrrhenian Sea north of Sicily. Kira explores Salina, Alicudi, Panarea, Stromboli, and Lipari--Each island bustling with a surprising array of personalities and professions.

programme.title: The Design Tourist
programme.desc: The Design Tourist travels to Frankfurt, Germany, the European financial capital, and a global host of trade shows. Explore the city's complicated history and fascinating culture through its legacy shaped war and commerce.

programme.title: Rustic Adventures: Italy
programme.desc: A hybrid food, travel and adventure show, Rustic Adventures follows two young, hot chefs who fulfilled their lifelong dream of building their own successful restaurants – from scratch – as they decide to take a much needed break and seek out inspiration for new endeavors while on a rustic food tour across Italy. Thanks to their Italian heritage, Rob Rossi (Opening: Bestellen) and Craig Harding (Opening: Campagnolo) connect with their roots while getting back to the basics of Italian cooking. With stunning cinematography and a candid documentary approach, this companion piece to the Opening series will entertain, inform and captivate you.

programme.title: Travel Diaries
programme.desc: The Voroneț Monastery is a medieval monastery in the Romanian village of Voroneț, now a part of the town Gura Humorului.It was founded by Stephen the Great, ruling prince of Moldavia, to fulfill a pledge to Daniil, a hermit who had encouraged him to chase the Turks from Wallachiia. After defeating the Turks, Stephen erected Voronet in less than four months

programme.title: The World Is Yours
programme.desc: We'll start our adventure with a tour of Brussels, we will visit the Stoclet Palace, declared a World Heritage Site by UNESCO. Then we'll go to the Atomium, an immense structure that represents an iron crystal, it has a restaurant in its highest sphere, from there you can see Laeken Park's 395 hectares. We'll visit the main square called "Grand Place", also declared a World Heritage Site in 1988. In the magical city of Bruges. Then, we will go to the Atacama Desert in Chile, in the Antofagasta region. We will visit the Valley of the Moon and the National Reserve of Flamingos. This desert is considered the best place on earth to observe the heavens and study astronomy, while In the Tatio geysers fields where there are thermal springs and fumaroles. And finally we'll arrive in Milan, Italy to see Piazza del Duomo,in downtown Milan, where you will not miss the best presentation of Italian Opera at the "Teatro alla Scala". Finally, we will end our adventure with a tour through the beautiful Navigli in Milan.

programme.title: 30 Minute Tour
programme.desc: Welcome to Dar es Salaam, a vibrant, diverse city with ocean front resorts, premiere shopping, fish markets, contemporary nightlife & Swahili cuisine.

programme.title: Painting The Town
programme.desc: Folk artist Eric Dowdle travels across North America, meeting the local people, sampling food, learning about culture and touring local attractions in an effort to determine what makes each place unique. Each episode culminates in the creation of a piece of colorful folk art that symbolizes the place Dowdle has visited.

programme.title: The World's Greatest Cities of The World
programme.sub-title: The World's Greatest Cities of The World: Philadelphia, Oslo, Montreal, Chicago, Boston, Washington, Incheon
programme.desc: Your first class ticket to the cities of the world. This series features large and small cities from around the world to reveal their icons, culture, tourist and hidden highlights with information about local customs, the cities personality and history.

programme.title: The Design Tourist
programme.desc: The Design Tourist travels to Frankfurt, Germany, the European financial capital, and a global host of trade shows. Explore the city's complicated history and fascinating culture through its legacy shaped war and commerce.

programme.title: Rustic Adventures: Italy

programme.title: Travel Diaries
programme.desc: The Voroneț Monastery is a medieval monastery in the Romanian village of Voroneț, now a part of the town Gura Humorului.It was founded by Stephen the Great, ruling prince of Moldavia, to fulfill a pledge to Daniil, a hermit who had encouraged him to chase the Turks from Wallachiia. After defeating the Turks, Stephen erected Voronet in less than four months

programme.title: Food Sail Love
programme.desc: In this second episode, we sail into Venice and visit our friend Renato, who has been the head chef at the Cipriani Hotel for over 25 years and has travelled the world as a food ambassador. Renato invites us into his kitchen to make some of his best-loved Venetian dishes. We then visit the famous Rialto markets and cook a few of my favourites in the yacht’s galley. We conclude our Venice adventure by visiting some friends at an old gondola repair yard called a squero. It has been converted into a private retreat featuring an impressive kitchen, from which we experience a memorable Venetian cook-up.

programme.title: Take A Seat: Egypt
programme.desc: Ahmed, a 'professional' cyclist, meets up with Dominic and rides with him to the Red Sea. Along the way he gains strength from praying on the roadside and talks of his personal experiences in Tahrir Square, which is the heart of the revolution. After a windy boat crossing across the Red Sea, they arrive in the Promised Land, the Sinai Peninsula.

programme.title: V Is For Vino
programme.sub-title: V Is For Vino - Napa, CA
programme.desc: Competition, controversy, and land that sell for 1M an acre! Napa Valley is the quintessential American wine region. It helped the USA gain the recognition it deserved in the wine world, and to this day still brings the thunder; but do you know the story of how it came to be? Find out on the premiere episode of V is for Vino.

programme.title: Adventure All Stars
programme.desc: Located in the Northern Rivers region of New South Wales, Australia, The Tweed is adjacent to the border with Queensland. Here, nature is more thana backdrop, it’s a source of inspiration: from tropical landscapes, ancient rainforests, and world-class adventures. The Tweed is a place where sparkling seaside villages, riverside towns and hinterland hamlets create endless holiday experiences. Once you discover this place, it’s hard to forget.

programme.title: Basin and Range Trail Thru Hike
programme.sub-title: Grant & Quinn Canyon Ranges, Hot Creek Spring & Lunar Crater
programme.desc: The Basin and Range Trail is a spectacular 1090 mile thru-hiking route across central Nevada’s Basin and Range country, better known as the Great Basin. The Basin and Range Trail, an original long distance hiking route created by Eric Poulin, showcases some of the best hiking Nevada has to offer, along with some of the toughest. Hiking the Great Basin means hiking off-trail, bushwhacking, along game trails. Unlike the well-blazed trails of the AT, PCT and CDT, the Basin and Range Trail is a different kind of thru hike.

programme.title: Meditations for Manifestation
programme.desc: This meditation for manifestation will bring gratitude into your life.

programme.title: Live Fearlessly with Anita Moorjani
programme.sub-title: How to Transcend Fear into Love
programme.desc: We live in a fear-based world. In today’s lesson, Anita offers you tools that have been specially created to overcome your fears with love. This is the greatest lesson she learned during her near-death experience when she traveled to the other side. It’s the lesson that saved her life.

programme.title: Live Fearlessly with Anita Moorjani
programme.sub-title: How to Transcend Fear into Love
programme.desc: We live in a fear-based world. In today’s lesson, Anita offers you tools that have been specially created to overcome your fears with love. This is the greatest lesson she learned during her near-death experience when she traveled to the other side. It’s the lesson that saved her life.

programme.title: Live Fearlessly with Anita Moorjani
programme.desc: Today, we take a close look at who we really are in order to recognize our purpose, understand our intentions, and recognize our true worth in this world.

programme.title: Live Fearlessly with Anita Moorjani
programme.desc: Today, we take a close look at who we really are in order to recognize our purpose, understand our intentions, and recognize our true worth in this world.

programme.title: Live Fearlessly with Anita Moorjani
programme.sub-title: Life Lessons from Almost Dying NEW
programme.desc: Today, Anita shares what her near-death experience taught her about how to live. You’ll discover why everything we have learned through our education system, government, mass media, etc. is the exact opposite of what we should know in order to create a meaningful, joy-filled life.

programme.title: Live Fearlessly with Anita Moorjani
programme.sub-title: Life Lessons from Almost Dying NEW
programme.desc: Today, Anita shares what her near-death experience taught her about how to live. You’ll discover why everything we have learned through our education system, government, mass media, etc. is the exact opposite of what we should know in order to create a meaningful, joy-filled life.

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie
programme.sub-title: I Don't Trust I'll Find Someone to Create a Life With
programme.desc: Definitive statements are comforting. They give life structure and clear direction. But what happens when your declarations are at odds with your subconscious desires?

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie
programme.sub-title: I Don't Trust I'll Find Someone to Create a Life With
programme.desc: Definitive statements are comforting. They give life structure and clear direction. But what happens when your declarations are at odds with your subconscious desires?

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie
programme.desc: Stop focusing on the object of your desires and start focusing on the reason for desiring that object in the first place. When you turn it around, you may find that what you really want is completely different than what you’ve been telling yourself.

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie
programme.desc: Stop focusing on the object of your desires and start focusing on the reason for desiring that object in the first place. When you turn it around, you may find that what you really want is completely different than what you’ve been telling yourself.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: The basic rules of food consumption come from one of Nidhi’s favorite Ayurvedic texts: the Charak Samhita. Charak is considered the father of Ayurveda, and the text is at least 1,000 years old. In it we find simple and applicable rules that you can bring to your life today.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: The basic rules of food consumption come from one of Nidhi’s favorite Ayurvedic texts: the Charak Samhita. Charak is considered the father of Ayurveda, and the text is at least 1,000 years old. In it we find simple and applicable rules that you can bring to your life today.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: A lot of people come to Ayurveda from Yoga and assume that it is purely a plant-based science. We want to bring you back to the perspective that Yoga is the science of energy, and Ayurveda is the science of matter. Ayurveda utilizes meats for the preservation of life; and in this segment, we address the quality and order of meats.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: A lot of people come to Ayurveda from Yoga and assume that it is purely a plant-based science. programme.title: Peace of Mind Parenting
programme.sub-title: Peace of Mind Parenting - Day 1: Positive Parenting in a Pandemic
programme.desc: Today, you'll learn solutions to this work, life, and parenting balancing problem many of us are experiencing during this pandemic. You're never going to be perfectly in balance, particularly during this time. But you’ll learn how to be aligned with your goals, values, and intentions.

programme.title: Peace of Mind Parenting
programme.sub-title: Peace of Mind Parenting - Day 1: Positive Parenting in a Pandemic
programme.desc: Today, you'll learn solutions to this work, life, and parenting balancing problem many of us are experiencing during this pandemic. You're never going to be perfectly in balance, particularly during this time. But you’ll learn how to be aligned with your goals, values, and intentions.

programme.title: Peace of Mind Parenting
programme.sub-title: Peace of Mind Parenting - Day 2: What to Do When Your Child is Stressed
programme.desc: Today, we shift our thinking. We view these behaviors not as a problem but as communication. Your child’s behavior is actually communication. They're communicating to you that they are stressed. When we tune into their behavior with this in mind, our perspective changes and we learn to lean in with empathy.

programme.title: Peace of Mind Parenting
programme.sub-title: Peace of Mind Parenting - Day 2: What to Do When Your Child is Stressed

programme.title: Healing Conversations
programme.desc: If you want to step into healing conversations, you have to have a clear understanding of where you’re going, and it starts within: the first healing conversation you need to have is with yourself.

programme.title: Healing Conversations
programme.desc: If you want to step into healing conversations, you have to have a clear understanding of where you’re going, and it starts within: the first healing conversation you need to have is with yourself.

programme.title: Healing Conversations

programme.title: Balance Your Hormones with Dr. Jolene Brighten
programme.desc: We can’t control everything in life, but there are some things that we do have a say in. These are things to focus on. Together, we'll learn practical changes you can make right now to start balancing your hormones and living a hormone balancing life. Remember, your hormones are the messengers. They send information all over your body to ensure that you get the right information at the right place and at the right time to continue living an optimally healthy life. Pretty important, right?

programme.title: Deep Relaxation with Tracee Stanley

programme.title: Deep Relaxation with Tracee Stanley

programme.title: The Nature of Reality
programme.sub-title: The Nature of Reality: Union with Yourself
programme.desc: The essential nature of the physical world is that it's not physical. The essential nature of the material world is that it's not material. As Rumi says, “We come spinning out of nothingness scattering stars like dust.”

programme.title: The Nature of Reality
programme.sub-title: The Nature of Reality: Union with Yourself
programme.desc: The essential nature of the physical world is that it's not physical. The essential nature of the material world is that it's not material. As Rumi says, “We come spinning out of nothingness scattering stars like dust.”

programme.title: The Nature of Reality
programme.sub-title: The Nature of Reality: Fulfillment of Desire
programme.desc: If you don't know yourself, you can’t know anything else. This is called self-realization. You have to give up your compulsion (which is very difficult, but once in awhile you can do it) to label things, define them, and create a story and meaning out of them. It's all a projection of yourself. Just be a silent witness.

programme.title: Dixiana
programme.desc: In antebellum New Orleans, two men vie for the affections of a beautiful young girl during Mardi Gras.

programme.title: Glorifying the American Girl
programme.desc: The rise of a showgirl, Gloria Hughes, culminating in a Ziegfeld extravaganza.

programme.title: Butley
programme.desc: An English professor finds his life crumbling around him.

programme.title: Criminal Affair
programme.desc: A renowned author, college professor and criminologist is given a year off in order to write his latest book. His arrival in Buenos Aires gives him the opportunity to work on his true project, planning and pulling off the perfect crime.

programme.title: The Clairvoyant
programme.desc: A fake music-hall clairvoyant meets a woman, and suddenly his predictions seem to come true.

programme.title: Adventure Island
programme.desc: Travelers find themselves marooned on an island with a maniacal self-made ruler.

programme.title: Scarlet Street
programme.desc: A man in mid-life crisis befriends a young woman, though her fiancé persuades her to con him out of the fortune they mistakenly assume he possesses.

programme.title: The Wasp Woman
programme.desc: The head of a large cosmetics company experiments on herself with a youth formula made from royal jelly extracted from wasps, but the formula's side effects have deadly consequences.

programme.title: City Park
programme.desc: Colonel Ransome comes to the rescue when impoverished Rose Wentworth poses as a streetwalker in order to get arrested to secure food and lodgings.

programme.title: Maybe I'll Come Home in the Spring
programme.desc: After finding out that the hippie lifestyle isn't as glamorous as the media makes it look, Dennie comes home to find disapproval and judgment at every turn, and her sister Susie wanting to follow in her footsteps.

programme.title: Tarzan and the Trappers
programme.desc: After dispatching a ruthless hunter who traps animals for gain, he has to contend with his brother who is out for revenge.

programme.title: Campbell's Kingdom
programme.desc: Englishman Bruce Campbell (Dirk Bogarde) takes possession of his grandfather's Canadian land, but he faces various challenges such as disgruntled locals, a ruthless contractor, a new power dam, and his own bad health.

programme.title: The Strange Woman
programme.desc: In New England in the 1820s, the beautiful but poor and manipulative Jenny Hager marries rich old Isaiah Poster, but also seduces his son and foreman.

programme.title: Half Shot At Sunrise
programme.desc: The stage stars Wheeler and Woolsey play two soldiers who go absent without leave in Paris, during World War I.

programme.title: The Last Chance
programme.desc: Escaping a Nazi prison train in war-torn Italy, an American and a British soldier set out for the Swiss border and find themselves leading a multi-national party of refugees for the Italian underground.

programme.title: The Camels are Coming
programme.desc: A British officer in the Camel Corps in Egypt goes undercover to investigate a gang of drug smugglers. He enlists the aid of a female pilot to help break up the gang.

programme.title: ENCORE: The 2024 Gemini Boat Race
programme.desc: The Boat Race is an annual event between crews from the University of Oxford and the University of Cambridge. The Men’s Boat Race was first raced in 1829 and is now one of the world’s oldest and most famous amateur sporting events. The Women’s Boat Race first took place in 1927. For every student athlete in one of the eight crews competing, being part of The Boat Race is an unrivalled educational and athletic experience.

programme.title: HealthDay

programme.sub-title: What You Need to Know about the 988 Hotline

programme.title: Zo Zo Zombie
programme.desc: Isamu and Zo Zo Zombie make a new friend: the airy Bellow the Cloud. When the young nimbus shows them his ability to change shapes, and to transform water into rain or snow, Isamu gets the bright idea to feed him donuts.

programme.title: Zo Zo Zombie
programme.desc: Zo Zo and Isamu are headed to Uncle Zombo’s house with a load of groceries for him, but on the way, the vital bottle of Uncle’s favorite hot sauce is stolen by the Lake Monster! Time for a ferocious battle!

programme.desc: While working as a night-shift nurse to support her son, Jude, a widowed single mother undergoing treatment for sickle cell disease meets and enters into a relationship with Silence, a troubled and brooding boxer who becomes a father figure for the young boy.

programme.title: MANGO WARS
programme.desc: Mango Wars, a comedy set in present day Kingston, Jamaica, follows Mr. Brown who runs a mango jelly business with his pregnant wife, Mrs. Brown. Fed up with the theft of mangoes from his mango tree and the impending birth of his first child, he develops an elaborate plan to catch the thief red handed. But when all of the traps are set off by unlikely elements, Mr. Brown has to rethink what really matters.

programme.title: BROTHERS HYPNOTIC
programme.desc: For the eight young men in the Hypnotic Brass Ensemble, 'brotherhood' is literal: they're all sons of anti-establishment jazz legend, Phil Cohran.

programme.title: THE PIROGUE
programme.desc: In Moussa ToureÆs powerful epic fiction film, a group of 30 men sail to Europe in a pirogue, facing the sea - and the possibility of never reaching their destination - in exchange for the myth of a better life in Europe.

programme.title: BECOMING FREE
programme.desc: Becoming Free follows three young people who are returning home to Washington, DC, after spending years or decades behind bars.

programme.title: JERMAINE
programme.desc: Jermaine Johnson is a 36-year old father of three and husband to his high-school sweetheart, Lawanna.

programme.desc: Amid HoustonÆs museums, historic landmarks, and vibrant nightlife exists a cache of the nationÆs most prolific spoken word artists.

programme.title: DOO DOO'S REVENGE
programme.desc: Doo DooÆs Revenge compels us to ask the questions: at what age did I have learn to swallow my hurt? Would I do what Doo Doo did?

programme.title: MONA
programme.desc: In June 1973, a week before the Portuguese Prime Minister, Dr Ribeiro, is due to arrive in London for a state visit, protests all over the city are growing due to Portugal's harsh foreign policy in its colony of Mozambique.

programme.title: KEEPING OUR LOVED ONES ALIVE
programme.desc: Based on testimonies of the mothers and family victims of state violence in the Baixada Fluminense, this documentary addresses police violence in the lowland of Rio de Janeiro and brings a critical view of the StateÆs brutality, especially against black youth

programme.title: Domino: Battle of the Bones
programme.desc: Get ready for laughter and heartwarming moments as an elderly black man and his awkward white step-grandson join forces to challenge their opponents in a domino tournament.

programme.title: Sugar and Spice
programme.desc: Join Yudhika in her vibrant deli kitchen as she takes us on a journey of flavors, from her spicy Indian roots to African food. You’ll get fresh and wonderful meal ideas that are easy to prepare but will be sure to impress.

programme.title: Celeb Rides
programme.desc: Celeb Rides takes a look into the glamorous lives of your favorite celebrities. Take an up close look into their careers, their fun side and of course their dope whips!!! Join DJ Sabby and Ney The Bae as they take over the streets of Mzansi with the biggest names in the game.

programme.title: Stealing a Survivor
programme.desc: Struggling chauffeur company meets fading Hollywood, sparks uproarious comedy as Ray Martin crafts a rescue plan.

programme.title: In-Laws
programme.desc: Discouragement sweeps in as a new wife faces challenges adjusting to married life, and fights to earn the approval of her In-Laws.

programme.title: Sucka 4 Love
programme.desc: A man with anger issues will get the opportunity to marry his girlfriend only if he survives 30 days of anger boot camp.

programme.title: Clunkers
programme.desc: Ritchie's setback leads to an unexpected journey in the world of used car salesmanship.

programme.title: The Love Between Us
programme.desc: A heartwarming story of a young immigrant couple whose love is tried and tested as the struggle to make it in New York.

programme.title: Deceptions of Love
programme.desc: Venice's blissful marriage turns into a living hell when her husband's vengeful ex slithers back to reclaim her man.

programme.title: My Biggest Fan
programme.desc: Eager fans fuel Britney's online modeling success, but obsession turns fatal.

programme.title: Murder Gardens
programme.desc: Murder Gardens is a story of survival and family in a dangerous world of crime.

programme.title: How to Get Away with Cheating
programme.desc: Professor Keating's thriving career faces turmoil when a past fling seeks revenge, challenging his marriage.

programme.title: The Workout Room
programme.desc: Embark on a side-splitting adventure in The Workout Room, where comedy, chaos, and unexpected laughs abound.

programme.title: Zurura
programme.desc: Zurura showcases the best of Africa for travelers, with Kenya in the spotlight for Season One. Prepare for adventure, art, culture, food, and all that our East African gem has to offer.

programme.title: A Walk In Her Shoes
programme.desc: Embark on Metra Lundy's inspiring journey of empowerment and triumph in A Walk in Her Shoes.

programme.title: The Workers Cup
programme.desc: Inside Qatar's labor camps, African and Asian migrant workers building the facilities of the 2022 World Cup compete in a football tournament of their own.

programme.title: Jungle All the Way: A Jungle Book Christmas
Beverly Hills Christmas
programme.desc: Guided by Arch Angel Gabriel , Angelina embarks on an almost impossible mission to try and save her spoiled 14-year-old daughter from going down the wrong path.

programme.title: Eddie's Wonderland
programme.desc: Eddie loves to celebrate the holidays and wants to include everyone! Eddie's Wonderland is full of holiday shows that everyone can enjoy!

programme.title: A Christmas Star
programme.desc: Born under the Christmas Star, Noelle believes she has the gift to perform miracles. So when a conniving developer threatens her peaceful life, she and her friends create a plan to use her gift to save their village.

programme.title: Eddie's Wonderland
programme.desc: Eddie loves to celebrate the holidays and wants to include everyone! Eddie's Wonderland is full of holiday shows that everyone can enjoy!

programme.title: Jungle All the Way: A Jungle Book Christmas
The Christmas Switch
programme.desc: Through Eddie's wit and guile, he gives Sam that last night and finally finds the real meaning of Christmas the gambler's way.

programme.title: The Christmas Switch

programme.title: Eddie's Wonderland
programme.desc: Eddie loves to celebrate the holidays and wants to include everyone! Eddie's Wonderland is full of holiday shows that everyone can enjoy!

programme.title: Jungle All the Way: A Jungle Book Christmas
Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green’s new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he’s the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: The Sunny Bunnies are five fluffy balls of light named Turbo, Big Boo, Shiny, Iris and Hopper who can appear anywhere there is light. The Bunnies always bring joy and happiness, beaming down to explore new and exciting locations, finding fun and mischievous games to enjoy.

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: The Secrets of Honey Hills
programme.desc: Honey Hills is a small seaside town where all kind of animals live. It's a good neighbourhood. However, mysterious and inexplicable events sometimes cause misunderstandings among neighbours. Then, genius detective Sophie the Owl together with her young assistant Chirp the Squirrel take up the investigation.

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: It's countryside chaos as Shaun The Sheep returns to the small screen with his very own series. Peace in the valley turns to mayhem in the meadow as Shaun leads his flock into all sorts of scrapes and scraps, running rings around sheepdog Bitzer when the Farmer's back is turned.

programme.title: The Adventures of Peter and Wolf
programme.desc: A sitcom about the adventures of ordinary schoolboy Peter and talking Wolf connecting the world of people to parallel universes, where there live robots and vampires, werewolves and zombies, giants and aliens, fairies and centaurs, clones and invisible men! The characters will have to solve locals' problems and regularly save the world.

programme.title: I'll Get You! Holiday
programme.desc: The action takes place in all year round resort, where Wolf doesn't chase Hare to eat him anymore: now it's all about sports and competition. However, in his crazy chase after recognition and victories the grey hooligan often uses methods that aren't really fair, which provokes awkward and funny situations.

programme.title: Bat Pat
programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn’t always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: Monsuno
programme.desc: The series revolves around re-awakened Monster DNA, called Monsuno, that finds its way into the unsuspecting hands of adventure-seeking teenagers Chase, Jinja, and Bren. Accompanied by their Monsuno, Lock, Charger, and Quickforce, they are searching for Chase's father Jeredy Suno, the creator of the Monsuno

programme.title: Pincode
programme.desc: Grown up Kikoriki characters rock the world with their scientific superpowers and tell the kids scientific facts in a most entertaining way. The crew follows Captain Pin as they learn about the world we live in and share this knowledge with us.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: Action Dad
programme.desc: Super Spy, and Super Dad All In One!

programme.title: Robocar POLI
programme.desc: The courageous and swift police car POLI, the powerful fire engine ROY, the intelligent AMBER, and the flying HELLY are all here to save the day!

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner... his mom!

programme.title: Fishtronaut
programme.desc: The series tells the story of Fishtronaut, a fish in a spacesuit, similar to reverse scuba gear, which allows him to fly and breathe out of water.

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green’s new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he’s the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner... his mom!

programme.title: Fishtronaut
programme.desc: The series tells the story of Fishtronaut, a fish in a spacesuit, similar to reverse scuba gear, which allows him to fly and breathe out of water.

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green’s new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he’s the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: i24NEWS Updates
programme.desc: i24NEWS Updates brings the days biggest stories from Israel and the Middle East with studios in Tel Aviv and Paris.

programme.title: La Bodega
programme.desc: "La Bodega" is your auditory journey into the heart of a vibrant Latin bodega, where the pulse of the neighborhood meets the rhythm of the streets. Featuring an eclectic mix of sounds, from the timeless classics of Marc Anthony and Romeo Santos to the infectious beats of Yailin La Mas Viral and more, this playlist captures the essence of community and culture. Whether you're grabbing your morning cafecito or browsing the aisles for your favorite snacks, let the music of "La Bodega" transport you to the lively streets of Latin America with every beat.

programme.title: Otra Vaina
programme.desc: "Otra Vaina" is your gateway to the unconventional, featuring music that breaks the mold and defies expectations. With tracks from boundary-pushing artists like Bad Bunny, Camilo, Karol G, and more, this playlist offers a refreshing departure from the mainstream. From experimental sounds to bold artistic statements, each song dares to be different, inviting listeners on a journey of musical exploration and discovery. Whether you're seeking innovation or simply craving something new, "Otra Vaina" promises to challenge your perceptions and ignite your imagination with its eclectic selection of out-of-the-box tunes.

programme.title: Freestyles
programme.desc: "Freestyles" is your gateway to the most captivating and raw expressions of lyrical prowess showcased by top artists on the internet. Featuring mind-blowing performances from talents like Bizarrap, Shakira, Messiah, and more, this playlist celebrates the art of improvisation and creativity in its purest form. Each video is a testament to the artist's skill and ingenuity, offering viewers an exhilarating glimpse into the world of spontaneous musical brilliance. Get ready to be mesmerized by the electrifying energy and unmatched talent displayed in the world of freestyles.

programme.title: House Party
programme.desc: "House Party" is the ultimate soundtrack for your next bash, featuring the hottest tunes that set the vibe for an unforgettable night of revelry. With tracks from powerhouse artists like Daddy Yankee, El Alfa, Karol G, and more, this playlist captures the energy and excitement of a bustling house party. From reggaeton anthems to infectious beats, each song promises to keep the dance floor packed and the spirits high. Get ready to turn up the volume and let the music ignite the party atmosphere like never before!

programme.title: Best of:
programme.desc: Best of Bad Bunny is the ultimate compilation of Bad Bunny's most iconic music videos, showcasing his unparalleled talent and groundbreaking style. From chart-topping hits to fan-favorite anthems, each video offers a glimpse into the vibrant world of one of Latin music's biggest stars. Whether you're a die-hard fan or a newcomer to his music, this playlist is your definitive guide to the best of Bad Bunny. Get ready to immerse yourself in his mesmerizing visuals and infectious beats as you experience the brilliance of Bad Bunny.

programme.title: El Discovery
programme.desc: "El Discovery" playlist is your gateway to uncovering the latest tunes and emerging artists in the Latin music scene. Featuring powerhouse talents like Peso Pluma, Maria Becerra, Quevedo, and more, each track is a vibrant exploration of diverse genres and styles. From infectious beats to soul-stirring melodies, immerse yourself in this curated collection and embark on a journey of musical discovery like never before. Whether you're a seasoned aficionado or a newcomer, "El Discovery" promises to ignite your passion for fresh sounds and undiscovered talents.

Tune in and let the pulse of the music drive your rhythm!

programme.title: La Grasa
programme.desc: "La Grasa" is the ultimate urban playlist, curated for those who thrive on the pulse of the streets. Featuring the hottest tracks favored by the urban crowd, this collection boasts electrifying beats and raw, unapologetic lyrics. With artists like Eladio Carrion, Yovngchimi, Tokischa, and more leading the charge, each song captures the essence of city life and the vibrant energy of its people. Whether you're hitting the streets or vibing with friends, "La Grasa" delivers the soundtrack for urban living at its finest.

programme.title: Viva La Raza
programme.desc: "Viva La Raza" celebrates the rich tapestry of Mexican music with a dynamic blend of chart-topping hits and beloved classics. From the infectious rhythms of Peso Pluma and Fuerza Regida to the soulful melodies of Carin Leon and more, this playlist is a vibrant tribute to the diverse sounds of Mexican music. Whether you're drawn to regional Mexican genres like corridos and banda or contemporary pop and urbano, "Viva La Raza" promises to immerse you in the passionate spirit and cultural heritage of Mexico through its electrifying tunes.

programme.title: Por Amarte Tanto
programme.desc: Laura es una bella joven heredera de una millonaria fortuna. Sin embargo, todo ese dinero no le ha causado mas que dolores de cabeza y al corazon, mientras espera encontrar algun dia el verdadero amor. Lamentablemente para Laura, el hombre que ahora intenta ganarse su corazon es una sanguijuela. Todo lo que busca es su dinero y la seguridad financiera que puede darle. Su sueno siempre ha sido encontrar a una rica y bella heredera y Laura es la chica que escoge como blanco. Al mismo tiempo, este hombre tiene un romance con la salvaje y peligrosa prima de Laura, por la que siente una ardiente pasion.

programme.title: Ines Duarte - Secretaria
programme.desc: Esta magistral historia narra los hechos que marcaron la vida de Ines Duarte, una joven secretaria a quien la sobreproteccion maternal convirtio en un ser reprimido, en una persona gris, en una desconocedora total de su potencial como mujer. Ines Duarte es una secretaria eficiente, muy util, muy fiel, muy trabajadora. Ella es la sombra de un gran magnate, Andres Martan. Ines lo resuelve todo, ella es casi necesaria para su jefe. El y su trabajo son la razon de su vida. Poco a poco, la pasion va haciendose mas presente en el corazon de Ines, colmandolo del mas fiel y secreto amor. Pero la vida de Andres va por otros caminos, para el, Ines es poco mas que un robot programado para servirle. Un matrimonio, hijos, viudez y mucha amargura van conformando el cuadro de la vida de Andres Martan, convirtiendolo en un hombre duro, encerrado en si mismo, en un despota. Pero los grandes cambios vendran, una nueva Ines irrumpira en la trama dando un vuelco total a los acontecimientos, creando multiples e inesperadas situaciones que sorprenderan y atraparan al televidente en las redes de esta formidable novela.

programme.title: La Mujer Perfecta
programme.desc: Luego de evitar el encuentro con su madre, Lucia se reune con Santiago para que este la convenza de no realizar el viaje a Argentina. Tras el descubrimiento de la falta de los documentos tan importante para Polanco, este reune a su personal de vigilancia y le pide a Beto que se reincorpore, encuentre y elimine a Minerva. Mientras Polanco esta reunido con su personal, Eva habilmente indaga al personal de servicio y descubre que quienes estuvieron en la noche fueron Minerva y Nene. Shirley por fin consigue hacer algo distinto en la novela, debe llorar, pero no lo logra; le pide ayuda a Gala. Con la excusa de ensenarle un truco, Gala le saca informacion sobre Micaela y Santiago.

programme.title: Alma Indomable
programme.desc: Dubraska y Juan Pablo se casan. Fernando esta en la carcel por atropellar a Juvenal. Fucha le avisa a Carmela que Fernando atropello a alguien y ahora esta preso. Nicanor le inyecta veneno a Juvenal y lo mata para de esta forma no pagarle y hundir a Fernando. Teo cuenta que fue testigo del accidente. Juan Pablo y Dubraska se van de luna de miel a Italia. Nicanor le muestra a Susi el bar donde esta trabajando Alma | Susi se burla de Alma y ella se enfurece y comienzan a pelear armando un alboroto | llega Suzette y los expulsa a todos del bar despidiendo a Alma. Patricio piensa irse de vacaciones y dejar de encargado a Esteban.

programme.title: Las Gonzalez
programme.desc: A su llegada a la floristeria Violeta presenta a Robinson ante su familia como el nuevo mensajero repartidor, dejando asi esclarecido ante los ojos de Aleli la farsa del muchacho quien desde el principio la lleno de enganos y mentiras esperando asi llamar su atencion, Aleli se muestra desencantada de su propio anhelo de esperar la llegada de su principe azul al conocer la verdadera procedencia de Robinson e identificarlo como el hijo de Prospero el kioskero. En el consultorio dental Cayetano comenta ante Otto de Jesus y Bromelia las consecuencias de sus actos tras involucrarse en la guerrilla personal existente entre Lirio y Orquidea.

programme.title: Cosita Rica
programme.desc: Paula C. es la muchacha mas popular del barrio Republica. Posee un angel que la hace inolvidable y encantadora. Por eso, el dia que Diego Lujan, el joven empresario y futuro heredero de un imperio de cosmeticos, se cruzo con ella, se le marcaron sus ojos para siempre en la memoria. Diego estaba a una semana de casarse con la modelo mas hermosa de la ciudad: Vicky Cardenas. Ella era la imagen exclusiva de las empresas Avila y la afortunada prometida de un soltero impenitente y codiciado, como siempre se le habia conocido a Diego. Pero el destino jugo sus cartas. El encuentro entre Paula C. y Diego fue lo mas parecido a una tormenta, o lo que es lo mismo, a una gran historia de amor. Porque a Paula C. le paso exactamente lo mismo cuando vio a Diego: el estremecimiento de un huracan.

programme.title: Por Amarte Tanto
programme.desc: Laura es una bella joven heredera de una millonaria fortuna. Sin embargo, todo ese dinero no le ha causado mas que dolores de cabeza y al corazon, mientras espera encontrar algun dia el verdadero amor. programme.title: La Mujer Perfecta
programme.desc: Polanco ahorca a Eva cuando se entera que fue a ver a Nene, no soporta que este cerca de el. Minerva va a ver a Larry y Karla para explicarles que es lo que esta pasando con ella y su bebe. Santiago va a ver a su madre para convencerla de que no se vaya a vivir a Argentina, porque se va a casar por la iglesia y ella debe ser la madrina de la boda. Gala se siente muy sola un sabado por la noche y se queda conversando con Tarzan, finalmente le pide que vaya a buscar a Larry para que pase la noche con ella. Shirley se esta mudando al anexo que hay en su casa, con ayuda de Micaela y de su tia Presentacion, cuando llega Lucho para hablar con ella sobre los videos que esta subiendo a YouTube.

programme.title: Alma Indomable
programme.desc: Caridad va visitar a Alma y le cuenta que Fucha hablo con Juan Pablo y le dijo que ella trabajaba en el bar de Ofelia, tambien le dice que Juan Pablo esta enamorado de ella. Abigail Richiardi luego de atropellar a Juan Pablo lo lleva hasta el hotel para ayudarlo y queda fascinada con el. Decide conquistarlo a cualquier precio | se lo cuenta su primo Esteban que casualmente esta en casa de Patricio. Esteban vuelve a encontrase con Alma quien esta triste porque nuevamente se quedo sin trabajo | conversan y se entera que ella esta enamorada de otro hombre. Patricio decide irse de viaje y dejar a Esteban a cargo del rancho | toda la familia esta en contra.

programme.title: Las Gonzalez
programme.desc: Tras saber a Aleli fuera del compromiso y la fidelidad de un matrimonio Robinson emprende nuevamente su cortejo a favor de su joven jefa al invitarla a salir, Aleli dejandose llevar por la desconfianza reinante en ella desde su primera desilusion amorosa se enfrenta a Robinson en una discusion echando por tierra su esperanza de conquistarla. Orquidea aprovecha la visita de Cayetano a la floristeria para echarle en cara su traicion al saberlo el informante de Lirio en el asunto del prestamo. En el consultorio odontologico Otto de Jesus se apresta a atender a la voluptuosa Azalea ante la mirada vigilante de Bromelia. En la floristeria Gonzala y Ubaldo son testigos de la premura de Orquidea quien los informa sobre sus intenciones de visitar el banco.

programme.title: Cosita Rica
programme.desc: Paula C. es la muchacha mas popular del barrio Republica. Posee un angel que la hace inolvidable y encantadora. Por eso, el dia que Diego Lujan, el joven empresario y futuro heredero de un imperio de cosmeticos, se cruzo con ella, se le marcaron sus ojos para siempre en la memoria. Diego estaba a una semana de casarse con la modelo mas hermosa de la ciudad: Vicky Cardenas. Ella era la imagen exclusiva de las empresas Avila y la afortunada prometida de un soltero impenitente y codiciado, como siempre se le habia conocido a Diego. Pero el destino jugo sus cartas. El encuentro entre Paula C. y Diego fue lo mas parecido a una tormenta, o lo que es lo mismo, a una gran historia de amor. Porque a Paula C. le paso exactamente lo mismo cuando vio a Diego: el estremecimiento de un huracan.

programme.title: Por Amarte Tanto
programme.desc: Laura es una bella joven heredera de una millonaria fortuna. Sin embargo, todo ese dinero no le ha causado mas que dolores de cabeza y al corazon, mientras espera encontrar algun dia el verdadero amor. Lamentablemente para Laura, el hombre que ahora intenta ganarse su corazon es una sanguijuela. Todo lo que busca es su dinero y la seguridad financiera que puede darle. Su sueno siempre ha sido encontrar a una rica y bella heredera y Laura es la chica que escoge como blanco. Al mismo tiempo, este hombre tiene un romance con la salvaje y peligrosa prima de Laura, por la que siente una ardiente pasion.

programme.title: Ines Duarte - Secretaria
programme.desc: Esta magistral historia narra los hechos que marcaron la vida de Ines Duarte, una joven secretaria a quien la sobreproteccion maternal convirtio en un ser reprimido, en una persona gris, en una desconocedora total de su potencial como mujer. Ines Duarte es una secretaria eficiente, muy util, muy fiel, muy trabajadora. Ella es la sombra de un gran magnate, Andres Martan. Ines lo resuelve todo, ella es casi necesaria para su jefe. El y su trabajo son la razon de su vida. Poco a poco, la pasion va haciendose mas presente en el corazon de Ines, colmandolo del mas fiel y secreto amor. Pero la vida de Andres va por otros caminos, para el, Ines es poco mas que un robot programado para servirle. Un matrimonio, hijos, viudez y mucha amargura van conformando el cuadro de la vida de Andres Martan, convirtiendolo en un hombre duro, encerrado en si mismo, en un despota. Pero los grandes cambios vendran, una nueva Ines irrumpira en la trama dando un vuelco total a los acontecimientos, creando multiples e inesperadas situaciones que sorprenderan y atraparan al televidente en las redes de esta formidable novela.

programme.title: La Mujer Perfecta
programme.desc: Polanco ahorca a Eva cuando se entera que fue a ver a Nene, no soporta que este cerca de el. Minerva va a ver a Larry y Karla para explicarles que es lo que esta pasando con ella y su bebe. Santiago va a ver a su madre para convencerla de que no se vaya a vivir a Argentina, porque se va a casar por la iglesia y ella debe ser la madrina de la boda. Gala se siente muy sola un sabado por la noche y se queda conversando con Tarzan, finalmente le pide que vaya a buscar a Larry para que pase la noche con ella. Shirley se esta mudando al anexo que hay en su casa, con ayuda de Micaela y de su tia Presentacion, cuando llega Lucho para hablar con ella sobre los videos que esta subiendo a YouTube.

programme.title: Alma Indomable
programme.desc: Caridad va visitar a Alma y le cuenta que Fucha hablo con Juan Pablo y le dijo que ella trabajaba en el bar de Ofelia, tambien le dice que Juan Pablo esta enamorado de ella. Abigail Richiardi luego de atropellar a Juan Pablo lo lleva hasta el hotel para ayudarlo y queda fascinada con el. Decide conquistarlo a cualquier precio | se lo cuenta su primo Esteban que casualmente esta en casa de Patricio. Esteban vuelve a encontrase con Alma quien esta triste porque nuevamente se quedo sin trabajo | conversan y se entera que ella esta enamorada de otro hombre. Patricio decide irse de viaje y dejar a Esteban a cargo del rancho | toda la familia esta en contra.

programme.title: Las Gonzalez
programme.desc: Tras saber a Aleli fuera del compromiso y la fidelidad de un matrimonio Robinson emprende nuevamente su cortejo a favor de su joven jefa al invitarla a salir, Aleli dejandose llevar por la desconfianza reinante en ella desde su primera desilusion amorosa se enfrenta a Robinson en una discusion echando por tierra su esperanza de conquistarla. Orquidea aprovecha la visita de Cayetano a la floristeria para echarle en cara su traicion al saberlo el informante de Lirio en el asunto del prestamo. En el consultorio odontologico Otto de Jesus se apresta a atender a la voluptuosa Azalea ante la mirada vigilante de Bromelia. En la floristeria Gonzala y Ubaldo son testigos de la premura de Orquidea quien los informa sobre sus intenciones de visitar el banco.

programme.title: Cosita Rica
programme.desc: Paula C. es la muchacha mas popular del barrio Republica. Posee un angel que la hace inolvidable y encantadora. Por eso, el dia que Diego Lujan, el joven empresario y futuro heredero de un imperio de cosmeticos, se cruzo con ella, se le marcaron sus ojos para siempre en la memoria. Diego estaba a una semana de casarse con la modelo mas hermosa de la ciudad: Vicky Cardenas. Ella era la imagen exclusiva de las empresas Avila y la afortunada prometida de un soltero impenitente y codiciado, como siempre se le habia conocido a Diego. Pero el destino jugo sus cartas. El encuentro entre Paula C. y Diego fue lo mas parecido a una tormenta, o lo que es lo mismo, a una gran historia de amor. Porque a Paula C. le paso exactamente lo mismo cuando vio a Diego: el estremecimiento de un huracan.

programme.title: Por Amarte Tanto
programme.desc: Laura es una bella joven heredera de una millonaria fortuna. Sin embargo, todo ese dinero no le ha causado mas que dolores de cabeza y al corazon, mientras espera encontrar algun dia el verdadero amor. Lamentablemente para Laura, el hombre que ahora intenta ganarse su corazon es una sanguijuela. Todo lo que busca es su dinero y la seguridad financiera que puede darle. Su sueno siempre ha sido encontrar a una rica y bella heredera y Laura es la chica que escoge como blanco. Al mismo tiempo, este hombre tiene un romance con la salvaje y peligrosa prima de Laura, por la que siente una ardiente pasion.

programme.title: Ines Duarte - Secretaria
programme.desc: Esta magistral historia narra los hechos que marcaron la vida de Ines Duarte, una joven secretaria a quien la sobreproteccion maternal convirtio en un ser reprimido, en una persona gris, en una desconocedora total de su potencial como mujer. Ines Duarte es una secretaria eficiente, muy util, muy fiel, muy trabajadora. Ella es la sombra de un gran magnate, Andres Martan. Ines lo resuelve todo, ella es casi necesaria para su jefe. El y su trabajo son la razon de su vida. Poco a poco, la pasion va haciendose mas presente en el corazon de Ines, colmandolo del mas fiel y secreto amor. Pero la vida de Andres va por otros caminos, para el, Ines es poco mas que un robot programado para servirle. Un matrimonio, hijos, viudez y mucha amargura van conformando el cuadro de la vida de Andres Martan, convirtiendolo en un hombre duro, encerrado en si mismo, en un despota. Pero los grandes cambios vendran, una nueva Ines irrumpira en la trama dando un vuelco total a los acontecimientos, creando multiples e inesperadas situaciones que sorprenderan y atraparan al televidente en las redes de esta formidable novela.
